src=\"https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/vanta/0.5.24/vanta.waves.min.js\"></script>\n    <script src=\"https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/Chart.js/3.9.1/chart.min.js\"></script>\n    <script src=\"https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/matter-js/0.18.0/matter.min.js\"></script>\n    \n    <style>\n        :root {\n            /* Color Palette */\n            --forge-black: #1a1a1a;\n            --hammered-iron: #2d2d2d;\n            --steel-gray: #4a4a4a;\n            --copper-patina: #b87333;\n            --molten-gold: #d4af37;\n            --ember-orange: #cc5500;\n            --vellum: #f5f5dc;\n            --ink-brown: #3e2723;\n            --slate-blue: #2c3e50;\n            --form-violet: #663399;\n            --wholeness-amber: #ffbf00;\n            --purity-silver: #c0c0c0;\n            --entropy-red: #8b0000;\n            \n            /* Typography */\n            --font-display: 'Cinzel', serif;\n            --font-body: 'Crimson Text', serif;\n            --font-code: 'Fira Code', monospace;\n            --font-handwriting: 'Kalam', cursive;\n            \n            /* Spacing */\n            --spacing-xs: 0.5rem;\n            --spacing-sm: 1rem;\n            --spacing-md: 1.5rem;\n            --spacing-lg: 2rem;\n            --spacing-xl: 3rem;\n            \n            /* Transitions */\n            --transition-fast: 0.2s ease;\n            --transition-medium: 0.4s ease;\n            --transition-slow: 0.6s ease;\n        }\n        \n        * {\n            margin: 0;\n            padding: 0;\n            box-sizing: border-box;\n        }\n        \n        body {\n            font-family: var(--font-body);\n            background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--forge-black) 0%, var(--hammered-iron) 100%);\n            color: var(--vellum);\n            line-height: 1.6;\n            overflow-x: hidden;\n            min-height: 100vh;\n        }\n        \n        /* Background Animation */\n        #vanta-bg {\n            position: fixed;\n            top: 0;\n            left: 0;\n            width: 100%;\n            height: 100%;\n            z-index: -1;\n            opacity: 0.3;\n        }\n        \n        /* Navigation */\n        .nav-container {\n            position: fixed;\n            top: 0;\n            left: 0;\n            right: 0;\n            background: rgba(26, 26, 26, 0.95);\n            backdrop-filter: blur(10px);\n            border-bottom: 2px solid var(--copper-patina);\n            z-index: 1000;\n            padding: var(--spacing-sm) 0;\n        }\n        \n        .nav-content {\n            max-width: 1200px;\n            margin: 0 auto;\n            display: flex;\n            justify-content: space-between;\n            align-items: center;\n            padding: 0 var(--spacing-lg);\n        }\n        \n        .nav-title {\n            font-family: var(--font-display);\n            font-size: 1.8rem;\n            font-weight: 700;\n            color: var(--molten-gold);\n            text-shadow: 2px 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);\n        }\n        \n        .nav-menu {\n            display: flex;\n            gap: var(--spacing-lg);\n            list-style: none;\n        }\n        \n        .nav-item a {\n            color: var(--vellum);\n            text-decoration: none;\n            font-weight: 500;\n            transition: var(--transition-fast);\n            position: relative;\n            padding: var(--spacing-xs) var(--spacing-sm);\n            border-radius: 4px;\n        }\n        \n        .nav-item a:hover {\n            color: var(--copper-patina);\n            background: rgba(184, 115, 51, 0.1);\n        }\n        \n        .nav-item a::after {\n            content: '';\n            position: absolute;\n            bottom: -2px;\n            left: 50%;\n            width: 0;\n            height: 2px;\n            background: var(--copper-patina);\n            transition: var(--transition-medium);\n            transform: translateX(-50%);\n        }\n        \n        .nav-item a:hover::after {\n            width: 80%;\n        }\n        \n        /* Main Content */\n        .main-container {\n            margin-top: 80px;\n            padding: var(--spacing-xl) var(--spacing-lg);\n            max-width: 1200px;\n            margin-left: auto;\n            margin-right: auto;\n        }\n        \n        /* Hero Section */\n        .hero-section {\n            text-align: center;\n            padding: var(--spacing-xl) 0;\n            margin-bottom: var(--spacing-xl);\n            position: relative;\n        }\n        \n        .hero-title {\n            font-family: var(--font-display);\n            font-size: 4rem;\n            font-weight: 700;\n            color: var(--molten-gold);\n            text-shadow: 3px 3px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.7);\n            margin-bottom: var(--spacing-md);\n            letter-spacing: 2px;\n        }\n        \n        .hero-subtitle {\n            font-size: 1.4rem;\n            color: var(--copper-patina);\n            margin-bottom: var(--spacing-lg);\n            font-weight: 400;\n        }\n        \n        .hero-description {\n            font-size: 1.1rem;\n            max-width: 800px;\n            margin: 0 auto;\n            line-height: 1.8;\n            color: var(--vellum);\n            opacity: 0.9;\n        }\n        \n        /* Section Styling */\n        .section {\n            margin-bottom: var(--spacing-xl);\n            padding: var(--spacing-xl);\n            background: rgba(45, 45, 45, 0.6);\n            border-radius: 12px;\n            border: 1px solid rgba(184, 115, 51, 0.3);\n            backdrop-filter: blur(5px);\n            position: relative;\n            overflow: hidden;\n        }\n        \n        .section::before {\n            content: '';\n            position: absolute;\n            top: 0;\n            left: 0;\n            right: 0;\n            height: 3px;\n            background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--copper-patina), var(--molten-gold), var(--ember-orange));\n        }\n        \n        .section-title {\n            font-family: var(--font-display);\n            font-size: 2.2rem;\n            color: var(--molten-gold);\n            margin-bottom: var(--spacing-lg);\n            text-align: center;\n            position: relative;\n        }\n        \n        .section-title::after {\n            content: '';\n            position: absolute;\n            bottom: -8px;\n            left: 50%;\n            width: 60px;\n            height: 2px;\n            background: var(--copper-patina);\n            transform: translateX(-50%);\n        }\n        \n        .subsection {\n            margin-bottom: var(--spacing-lg);\n            padding: var(--spacing-lg);\n            background: rgba(26, 26, 26, 0.4);\n            border-radius: 8px;\n            border-left: 4px solid var(--copper-patina);\n        }\n        \n        .subsection-title {\n            font-family: var(--font-display);\n            font-size: 1.6rem;\n            color: var(--copper-patina);\n            margin-bottom: var(--spacing-md);\n        }\n        \n        /* Character Cards */\n        .character-grid {\n            display: grid;\n            grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(350px, 1fr));\n            gap: var(--spacing-lg);\n            margin-top: var(--spacing-lg);\n        }\n        \n        .character-card {\n            background: rgba(26, 26, 26, 0.7);\n            border-radius: 12px;\n            padding: var(--spacing-lg);\n            border: 2px solid var(--steel-gray);\n            transition: var(--transition-medium);\n            position: relative;\n            overflow: hidden;\n        }\n        \n        .character-card::before {\n            content: '';\n            position: absolute;\n            top: 0;\n            left: 0;\n            right: 0;\n            height: 4px;\n            background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--form-violet), var(--wholeness-amber), var(--purity-silver), var(--entropy-red));\n        }\n        \n        .character-card:hover {\n            transform: translateY(-5px);\n            border-color: var(--copper-patina);\n            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(184, 115, 51, 0.3);\n        }\n        \n        .character-name {\n            font-family: var(--font-display);\n            font-size: 1.4rem;\n            color: var(--molten-gold);\n            margin-bottom: var(--spacing-sm);\n        }\n        \n        .character-role {\n            font-size: 0.9rem;\n            color: var(--copper-patina);\n            margin-bottom: var(--spacing-md);\n            font-weight: 500;\n        }\n        \n        .character-description {\n            font-size: 0.95rem;\n            line-height: 1.6;\n            color: var(--vellum);\n            opacity: 0.9;\n        }\n        \n        /* Timeline */\n        .timeline-container {\n            position: relative;\n            padding: var(--spacing-lg) 0;\n        }\n        \n        .timeline-line {\n            position: absolute;\n            left: 50%;\n            top: 0;\n            bottom: 0;\n            width: 4px;\n            background: linear-gradient(to bottom, var(--copper-patina), var(--molten-gold));\n            transform: translateX(-50%);\n        }\n        \n        .timeline-item {\n            position: relative;\n            margin-bottom: var(--spacing-xl);\n            padding: 0 var(--spacing-xl);\n        }\n        \n        .timeline-item:nth-child(odd) .timeline-content {\n            margin-right: 50%;\n            padding-right: var(--spacing-lg);\n            text-align: right;\n        }\n        \n        .timeline-item:nth-child(even) .timeline-content {\n            margin-left: 50%;\n            padding-left: var(--spacing-lg);\n            text-align: left;\n        }\n        \n        .timeline-marker {\n            position: absolute;\n            left: 50%;\n            top: var(--spacing-md);\n            width: 20px;\n            height: 20px;\n            background: var(--molten-gold);\n            border: 3px solid var(--forge-black);\n            border-radius: 50%;\n            transform: translateX(-50%);\n            z-index: 2;\n        }\n        \n        .timeline-content {\n            background: rgba(26, 26, 26, 0.6);\n            padding: var(--spacing-lg);\n            border-radius: 8px;\n            border: 1px solid rgba(184, 115, 51, 0.3);\n        }\n        \n        .timeline-title {\n            font-family: var(--font-display);\n            font-size: 1.3rem;\n            color: var(--molten-gold);\n            margin-bottom: var(--spacing-sm);\n        }\n        \n        .timeline-period {\n            font-size: 0.9rem;\n            color: var(--copper-patina);\n            margin-bottom: var(--spacing-md);\n            font-weight: 500;\n        }\n        \n        /* Magic System Visualization */\n        .magic-system {\n            display: grid;\n            grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);\n            gap: var(--spacing-lg);\n            margin-top: var(--spacing-lg);\n        }\n        \n        .principle-card {\n            background: rgba(26, 26, 26, 0.7);\n            border-radius: 12px;\n            padding: var(--spacing-lg);\n            text-align: center;\n            transition: var(--transition-medium);\n            position: relative;\n            overflow: hidden;\n        }\n        \n        .principle-card::before {\n            content: '';\n            position: absolute;\n            top: 0;\n            left: 0;\n            right: 0;\n            height: 4px;\n            background: var(--principle-color);\n        }\n        \n        .principle-card[data-principle=\"form\"] { --principle-color: var(--form-violet); }\n        .principle-card[data-principle=\"wholeness\"] { --principle-color: var(--wholeness-amber); }\n        .principle-card[data-principle=\"purity\"] { --principle-color: var(--purity-silver); }\n        .principle-card[data-principle=\"entropy\"] { --principle-color: var(--entropy-red); }\n        \n        .principle-card:hover {\n            transform: translateY(-5px);\n            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(var(--principle-color), 0.3);\n        }\n        \n        .principle-icon {\n            font-size: 3rem;\n            color: var(--principle-color);\n            margin-bottom: var(--spacing-md);\n        }\n        \n        .principle-name {\n            font-family: var(--font-display);\n            font-size: 1.4rem;\n            color: var(--molten-gold);\n            margin-bottom: var(--spacing-sm);\n        }\n        \n        .principle-verb {\n            font-size: 1rem;\n            color: var(--copper-patina);\n            margin-bottom: var(--spacing-md);\n            font-style: italic;\n        }\n        \n        /* Interactive Elements */\n        .interactive-chart {\n            background: rgba(26, 26, 26, 0.7);\n            border-radius: 12px;\n            padding: var(--spacing-lg);\n            margin: var(--spacing-lg) 0;\n            border: 1px solid rgba(184, 115, 51, 0.3);\n        }\n        \n        .chart-title {\n            font-family: var(--font-display);\n            font-size: 1.3rem;\n            color: var(--molten-gold);\n            text-align: center;\n            margin-bottom: var(--spacing-md);\n        }\n        \n        .collapsible {\n            background: rgba(26, 26, 26, 0.6);\n            border: 1px solid rgba(184, 115, 51, 0.3);\n            border-radius: 8px;\n            margin-bottom: var(--spacing-md);\n            overflow: hidden;\n        }\n        \n        .collapsible-header {\n            background: rgba(184, 115, 51, 0.2);\n            padding: var(--spacing-md);\n            cursor: pointer;\n            display: flex;\n            justify-content: space-between;\n            align-items: center;\n            transition: var(--transition-fast);\n        }\n        \n        .collapsible-header:hover {\n            background: rgba(184, 115, 51, 0.3);\n        }\n        \n        .collapsible-title {\n            font-family: var(--font-display);\n            font-size: 1.2rem;\n            color: var(--copper-patina);\n        }\n        \n        .collapsible-icon {\n            color: var(--copper-patina);\n            transition: var(--transition-fast);\n        }\n        \n        .collapsible-content {\n            padding: var(--spacing-md);\n            display: none;\n        }\n        \n        .collapsible.active .collapsible-content {\n            display: block;\n        }\n        \n        .collapsible.active .collapsible-icon {\n            transform: rotate(180deg);\n        }\n        \n        /* Footer */\n        .footer {\n            background: rgba(26, 26, 26, 0.9);\n            border-top: 2px solid var(--copper-patina);\n            padding: var(--spacing-xl);\n            text-align: center;\n            margin-top: var(--spacing-xl);\n        }\n        \n        .footer-content {\n            max-width: 1200px;\n            margin: 0 auto;\n        }\n        \n        .footer-title {\n            font-family: var(--font-display);\n            font-size: 1.4rem;\n            color: var(--molten-gold);\n            margin-bottom: var(--spacing-md);\n        }\n        \n        .footer-text {\n            color: var(--vellum);\n            opacity: 0.8;\n            margin-bottom: var(--spacing-md);\n        }\n        \n        .footer-meta {\n            font-size: 0.9rem;\n            color: var(--copper-patina);\n            font-family: var(--font-code);\n        }\n        \n        /* Responsive Design */\n        @media (max-width: 768px) {\n            .nav-content {\n                flex-direction: column;\n                gap: var(--spacing-sm);\n            }\n            \n            .nav-menu {\n                gap: var(--spacing-sm);\n            }\n            \n            .hero-title {\n                font-size: 2.5rem;\n            }\n            \n            .main-container {\n                padding: var(--spacing-md);\n            }\n            \n            .character-grid {\n                grid-template-columns: 1fr;\n            }\n            \n            .magic-system {\n                grid-template-columns: 1fr;\n            }\n            \n            .timeline-item:nth-child(odd) .timeline-content,\n            .timeline-item:nth-child(even) .timeline-content {\n                margin: 0;\n                padding: var(--spacing-md);\n                text-align: left;\n            }\n            \n            .timeline-line {\n                left: var(--spacing-md);\n            }\n            \n            .timeline-marker {\n                left: var(--spacing-md);\n            }\n        }\n        \n        /* Scroll Animations */\n        .fade-in {\n            opacity: 0;\n            transform: translateY(30px);\n            transition: var(--transition-medium);\n        }\n        \n        .fade-in.visible {\n            opacity: 1;\n            transform: translateY(0);\n        }\n        \n        /* Loading Animation */\n        .loading {\n            display: flex;\n            justify-content: center;\n            align-items: center;\n            height: 100vh;\n            font-family: var(--font-display);\n            font-size: 1.5rem;\n            color: var(--molten-gold);\n        }\n        \n        .loading::after {\n            content: '';\n            width: 20px;\n            height: 20px;\n            border: 2px solid var(--copper-patina);\n            border-top: 2px solid var(--molten-gold);\n            border-radius: 50%;\n            animation: spin 1s linear infinite;\n            margin-left: var(--spacing-sm);\n        }\n        \n        @keyframes spin {\n            0% { transform: rotate(0deg); }\n            100% { transform: rotate(360deg); }\n        }\n        \n        /* Utility Classes */\n        .text-center { text-align: center; }\n        .text-gold { color: var(--molten-gold); }\n        .text-copper { color: var(--copper-patina); }\n        .text-violet { color: var(--form-violet); }\n        .text-amber { color: var(--wholeness-amber); }\n        .text-silver { color: var(--purity-silver); }\n        .text-red { color: var(--entropy-red); }\n        \n        .bg-dark { background: rgba(26, 26, 26, 0.8); }\n        .bg-medium { background: rgba(45, 45, 45, 0.6); }\n        .bg-light { background: rgba(74, 74, 74, 0.4); }\n        \n        .font-display { font-family: var(--font-display); }\n        .font-body { font-family: var(--font-body); }\n        .font-code { font-family: var(--font-code); }\n        .font-handwriting { font-family: var(--font-handwriting); }\n    </style>\n</head>\n<body>\n    <!-- Loading Screen -->\n    <div id=\"loading\" class=\"loading\">\n        Forging the Narrative\n    </div>\n    \n    <!-- Background Animation -->\n    <div id=\"vanta-bg\"></div>\n    \n    <!-- Navigation -->\n    <nav class=\"nav-container\">\n        <div class=\"nav-content\">\n            <div class=\"nav-title\">\n                <i class=\"fas fa-book-open\"></i> OmniMeta Saga\n            </div>\n            <ul class=\"nav-menu\">\n                <li class=\"nav-item\"><a href=\"#overview\">Overview</a></li>\n                <li class=\"nav-item\"><a href=\"#characters\">Characters</a></li>\n                <li class=\"nav-item\"><a href=\"#world\">World</a></li>\n                <li class=\"nav-item\"><a href=\"#magic\">Magic</a></li>\n                <li class=\"nav-item\"><a href=\"#timeline\">Timeline</a></li>\n                <li class=\"nav-item\"><a href=\"#themes\">Themes</a></li>\n            </ul>\n        </div>\n    </nav>\n    \n    <!-- Main Content -->\n    <main class=\"main-container\">\n        <!-- Hero Section -->\n        <section class=\"hero-section fade-in\">\n            <h1 class=\"hero-title\">Super Exponential Story Bible</h1>\n            <p class=\"hero-subtitle\">Complete Narrative Universe Documentation</p>\n            <p class=\"hero-description\">\n                A meticulously crafted 30-novella epic fantasy spanning six \"Turnings,\" \n                following the evolution of Jhace Torrins from craftsman to god-slayer \n                across approximately 6 years of his life. Every element serves the \n                central themes of partnership, cost, and balance in a world where \n                power always extracts its price.\n            </p>\n        </section>\n        \n        <!-- Saga Overview -->\n        <section id=\"overview\" class=\"section fade-in\">\n            <h2 class=\"section-title\">Saga Overview</h2>\n            \n            <div class=\"subsection\">\n                <h3 class=\"subsection-title\">The Hidden Message</h3>\n                <p>The 30 novella titles spell out a dual craft metaphor that mirrors the protagonist's spiritual journey:</p>\n                <div class=\"magic-system\">\n                    <div class=\"principle-card\" data-principle=\"glass\">\n                        <div class=\"principle-icon\"><i class=\"fas fa-wine-glass\"></i></div>\n                        <h4 class=\"principle-name\">GLASS</h4>\n                        <p class=\"principle-verb\">Fragile formation, transparent but breakable</p>\n                    </div>\n                    <div class=\"principle-card\" data-principle=\"crack\">\n                        <div class=\"principle-icon\"><i class=\"fas fa-hammer\"></i></div>\n                        <h4 class=\"principle-name\">CRACK</h4>\n                        <p class=\"principle-verb\">Collision of forces, fracture lines appearing</p>\n                    </div>\n                    <div class=\"principle-card\" data-principle=\"forge\">\n                        <div class=\"principle-icon\"><i class=\"fas fa-fire\"></i></div>\n                        <h4 class=\"principle-name\">FORGE</h4>\n                        <p class=\"principle-verb\">Hammering into shape, intense heat, transformation</p>\n                    </div>\n                    <div class=\"principle-card\" data-principle=\"smelt\">\n                        <div class=\"principle-icon\"><i class=\"fas fa-industry\"></i></div>\n                        <h4 class=\"principle-name\">SMELT</h4>\n                        <p class=\"principle-verb\">Melting down, purification, separation</p>\n                    </div>\n                    <div class=\"principle-card\" data-principle=\"clear\">\n                        <div class=\"principle-icon\"><i class=\"fas fa-eye\"></i></div>\n                        <h4 class=\"principle-name\">CLEAR</h4>\n                        <p class=\"principle-verb\">Refinement, clarity emerging, truth visible</p>\n                    </div>\n                    <div class=\"principle-card\" data-principle=\"break\">\n                        <div class=\"principle-icon\"><i class=\"fas fa-bolt\"></i></div>\n                        <h4 class=\"principle-name\">BREAK</h4>\n                        <p class=\"principle-verb\">Final shattering, ultimate transformation</p>\n                    </div>\n                </div>\n            </div>\n            \n            <div class=\"subsection\">\n                <h3 class=\"subsection-title\">Core Premise</h3>\n                <p>A mysterious projectile pierces completely through the planet Te'Oga, creating a permanent hole and fundamentally breaking planetary physics. This \"Piercing\" event awakens a dormant force called <strong>Soulpulse</strong> that did NOT exist before.</p>\n                \n                <div class=\"collapsible\">\n                    <div class=\"collapsible-header\">\n                        <span class=\"collapsible-title\">Physical Consequences</span>\n                        <i class=\"fas fa-chevron-down collapsible-icon\"></i>\n                    </div>\n                    <div class=\"collapsible-content\">\n                        <ul>\n                            <li>Axial tilt snapped to ~0° (no meaningful seasons)</li>\n                            <li>Catastrophic quakes and tsunamis reshape continents</li>\n                            <li>Permanent climate band disruption</li>\n                            <li>\"Scar storms\" near entry/exit wounds</li>\n                            <li>Resonance hotspots along damage path</li>\n                        </ul>\n                    </div>\n                </div>\n                \n                <div class=\"collapsible\">\n                    <div class=\"collapsible-header\">\n                        <span class=\"collapsible-title\">Metaphysical Consequences</span>\n                        <i class=\"fas fa-chevron-down collapsible-icon\"></i>\n                    </div>\n                    <div class=\"collapsible-content\">\n                        <ul>\n                            <li><strong>Soulpulse/Resonance emerges for the first time</strong></li>\n                            <li>Conscious will can now affect matter</li>\n                            <li>Four ancient gods begin awakening in mortal forms</li>\n                            <li>The Auditor begins orchestrating events toward stasis</li>\n                        </ul>\n                    </div>\n                </div>\n            </div>\n        </section>\n        \n        <!-- Characters Section -->\n        <section id=\"characters\" class=\"section fade-in\">\n            <h2 class=\"section-title\">Character Profiles</h2>\n            \n            <div class=\"subsection\">\n                <h3 class=\"subsection-title\">Protagonists</h3>\n                <div class=\"character-grid\">\n                    <div class=\"character-card\">\n                        <h4 class=\"character-name\">Jhace Torrins</h4>\n                        <p class=\"character-role\">The Craftsman Savior</p>\n                        <div class=\"character-description\">\n                            <strong>Age (N01):</strong> 28 turns<br>\n                            <strong>Craft:</strong> Forge-smith (gridwright), infrastructure specialist<br>\n                            <strong>Psychological Wound:</strong> Survivor's guilt - parents died in structural collapse at age 7, carries 23 names of the dead<br>\n                            <strong>Core Drive:</strong> Obsessive need to save everyone, prevent all deaths through vigilance<br>\n                            <strong>Soulpulse Alignment:</strong> Primarily FORM (holding, stabilizing, structural integrity)<br>\n                            <strong>Character Arc:</strong> Isolated savior → Collaborative leader → God-confronter\n                        </div>\n                    </div>\n                    \n                    <div class=\"character-card\">\n                        <h4 class=\"character-name\">Tiffani Merrow</h4>\n                        <p class=\"character-role\">The Perfectionist</p>\n                        <div class=\"character-description\">\n                            <strong>Age (N01):</strong> 26 turns<br>\n                            <strong>Craft:</strong> Glassworker, precision measurement and structural analysis<br>\n                            <strong>Psychological Wound:</strong> Guilt over friend Marisse's death in glasshouse accident (miscalculation)<br>\n                            <strong>Core Drive:</strong> Perfectionism, belief that vigilance alone prevents catastrophe<br>\n                            <strong>Soulpulse Alignment:</strong> Primarily WHOLENESS (mending, connecting, restoring)<br>\n                            <strong>Ultimate Fate:</strong> Dies in N05 from Soulpulse burnout holding catastrophic structural failure\n                        </div>\n                    </div>\n                </div>\n            </div>\n            \n            <div class=\"subsection\">\n                <h3 class=\"subsection-title\">The Four God-Vessels</h3>\n                <div class=\"magic-system\">\n                    <div class=\"principle-card\" data-principle=\"form\">\n                        <div class=\"principle-icon\"><i class=\"fas fa-cube\"></i></div>\n                        <h4 class=\"principle-name\">Corlexi (Xilcore)</h4>\n                        <p class=\"principle-verb\">FORM - Hold, stabilize, impose structure</p>\n                        <p>God of structure, order, frameworks. Cost: Muscle ache, joint stiffness, rigid tension. Danger: Over-stabilization, brittleness.</p>\n                    </div>\n                    \n                    <div class=\"principle-card\" data-principle=\"wholeness\">\n                        <div class=\"principle-icon\"><i class=\"fas fa-link\"></i></div>\n                        <h4 class=\"principle-name\">Salee (Leesa)</h4>\n                        <p class=\"principle-verb\">WHOLENESS - Mend, connect, restore continuity</p>\n                        <p>God of connection, unity, healing. Cost: Empathy overload, emotional drain. Danger: Boundary dissolution, compassion paralysis.</p>\n                    </div>\n                    \n                    <div class=\"principle-card\" data-principle=\"purity\">\n                        <div class=\"principle-icon\"><i class=\"fas fa-gem\"></i></div>\n                        <h4 class=\"principle-name\">Mobel (Blemo)</h4>\n                        <p class=\"principle-verb\">PURITY - Refine, distill, isolate essence</p>\n                        <p>God of perfection, separation, righteousness. Cost: Migraine, hyper-focus burnout. Danger: Obsessive perfectionism, isolation.</p>\n                    </div>\n                    \n                    <div class=\"principle-card\" data-principle=\"entropy\">\n                        <div class=\"principle-icon\"><i class=\"fas fa-skull\"></i></div>\n                        <h4 class=\"principle-name\">Eries (Seeri)</h4>\n                        <p class=\"principle-verb\">ENTROPY - Undo, release, accelerate decay</p>\n                        <p>God of endings, release, natural decay. Cost: Numbness, apathy, dissociation. Danger: Nihilism, destructive spirals.</p>\n                    </div>\n                </div>\n            </div>\n            \n            <div class=\"subsection\">\n                <h3 class=\"subsection-title\">The Antagonist</h3>\n                <div class=\"character-card\">\n                    <h4 class=\"character-name\">The Auditor / Counter-Spark</h4>\n                    <p class=\"character-role\">The Hidden Orchestrator</p>\n                    <div class=\"character-description\">\n                        <strong>True Identity:</strong> Counter-Spark (Stasis principle) in mortal form<br>\n                        <strong>Narrative Role:</strong> Unreliable narrator across all interludes and epilogues<br>\n                        <strong>Voice:</strong> Profane, sardonic, knowing, contemptuous<br>\n                        <strong>Facade:</strong> Appears supportive of god awakening, documents events as neutral observer<br>\n                        <strong>True Goal:</strong> Shepherding gods toward full power TO ELIMINATE THEM PERMANENTLY<br>\n                        <strong>Revelation Timing:</strong> Turning 6 (N26-N30)<br>\n                        <strong>Dramatic Irony:</strong> Every \"observation\" is hostile manipulation\n                    </div>\n                </div>\n            </div>\n        </section>\n        \n        <!-- World Section -->\n        <section id=\"world\" class=\"section fade-in\">\n            <h2 class=\"section-title\">World & Setting</h2>\n            \n            <div class=\"subsection\">\n                <h3 class=\"subsection-title\">Planet Te'Oga</h3>\n                <p>A mysterious projectile has pierced completely through the planet, creating a permanent hole and fundamentally altering its physics and climate.</p>\n                \n                <div class=\"interactive-chart\">\n                    <h4 class=\"chart-title\">Planetary Changes</h4>\n                    <canvas id=\"planetaryChart\" width=\"400\" height=\"200\"></canvas>\n                </div>\n            </div>\n            \n            <div class=\"subsection\">\n                <h3 class=\"subsection-title\">Time & Measurement Systems</h3>\n                <p>The world uses indigenous time and measurement units, never Earth terms.</p>\n                \n                <div class=\"collapsible\">\n                    <div class=\"collapsible-header\">\n                        <span class=\"collapsible-title\">Time Hierarchy</span>\n                        <i class=\"fas fa-chevron-down collapsible-icon\"></i>\n                    </div>\n                    <div class=\"collapsible-content\">\n                        <ul>\n                            <li><strong>Tide</strong> = ~24 hours (with phases: Kindling → Pouring → Shaping → Striking → Quench)</li>\n                            <li><strong>Anneal</strong> = ~7 tides (~1 week)</li>\n                            <li><strong>Crucible</strong> = ~30 tides (~1 month)</li>\n                            <li><strong>Turn</strong> = ~1 year (personal age)</li>\n                            <li><strong>Cast</strong> = ~1 year (historical time)</li>\n                            <li><strong>Turning</strong> = ~5-10 casts (historical era)</li>\n                        </ul>\n                    </div>\n                </div>\n            </div>\n        </section>\n        \n        <!-- Magic System -->\n        <section id=\"magic\" class=\"section fade-in\">\n            <h2 class=\"section-title\">Magic System</h2>\n            \n            <div class=\"subsection\">\n                <h3 class=\"subsection-title\">Soulpulse (Resonance)</h3>\n                <p>Conscious will given physical form through manipulation of matter's fundamental resonance. Always visible as colored light corresponding to Principle.</p>\n                \n                <div class=\"interactive-chart\">\n                    <h4 class=\"chart-title\">Cost Progression System</h4>\n                    <canvas id=\"costChart\" width=\"400\" height=\"200\"></canvas>\n                </div>\n            </div>\n            \n            <div class=\"subsection\">\n                <h3 class=\"subsection-title\">Cost Stages</h3>\n                <div class=\"character-grid\">\n                    <div class=\"character-card\">\n                        <h4 class=\"character-name text-amber\">Stage 1: Strain</h4>\n                        <p class=\"character-description\">\n                            Initial fatigue, minor tremors during use, temporary effects that fade with rest.\n                        </p>\n                    </div>\n                    \n                    <div class=\"character-card\">\n                        <h4 class=\"character-name text-copper\">Stage 2: Fatigue</h4>\n                        <p class=\"character-description\">\n                            Persistent tremor baseline, exhaustion after major use, functional impairment begins.\n                        </p>\n                    </div>\n                    \n                    <div class=\"character-card\">\n                        <h4 class=\"character-name text-red\">Stage 3: Burnout</h4>\n                        <p class=\"character-description\">\n                            Vein-lines permanently visible, fine motor control compromised, recovery takes longer.\n                        </p>\n                    </div>\n                    \n                    <div class=\"character-card\">\n                        <h4 class=\"character-name text-violet\">Stage 4: Collapse</h4>\n                        <p class=\"character-description\">\n                            Complete breakdown, potential death from environmental factors, irreversible without intervention.\n                        </p>\n                    </div>\n                </div>\n            </div>\n            \n            <div class=\"subsection\">\n                <h3 class=\"subsection-title\">Power Evolution</h3>\n                <div class=\"timeline-container\">\n                    <div class=\"timeline-line\"></div>\n                    \n                    <div class=\"timeline-item\">\n                        <div class=\"timeline-marker\"></div>\n                        <div class=\"timeline-content\">\n                            <h4 class=\"timeline-title\">N01-N05: Emergence</h4>\n                            <p class=\"timeline-period\">Basic manipulation, intuitive use, high cost, discovery of coordination</p>\n                        </div>\n                    </div>\n                    \n                    <div class=\"timeline-item\">\n                        <div class=\"timeline-marker\"></div>\n                        <div class=\"timeline-content\">\n                            <h4 class=\"timeline-title\">N06-N15: Training</h4>\n                            <p class=\"timeline-period\">Faction techniques, martial applications, combat magic emerges</p>\n                        </div>\n                    </div>\n                    \n                    <div class=\"timeline-item\">\n                        <div class=\"timeline-marker\"></div>\n                        <div class=\"timeline-content\">\n                            <h4 class=\"timeline-title\">N16-N25: Combat</h4>\n                            <p class=\"timeline-period\">Anime-style battle magic, Ki/Chakra-like systems, open divine warfare</p>\n                        </div>\n                    </div>\n                    \n                    <div class=\"timeline-item\">\n                        <div class=\"timeline-marker\"></div>\n                        <div class=\"timeline-content\">\n                            <h4 class=\"timeline-title\">N26-N30: God-Tier</h4>\n                            <p class=\"timeline-period\">Planetary-scale effects, god confrontations, ultimate mastery</p>\n                        </div>\n                    </div>\n                </div>\n            </div>\n        </section>\n        \n        <!-- Timeline Section -->\n        <section id=\"timeline\" class=\"section fade-in\">\n            <h2 class=\"section-title\">Saga Timeline</h2>\n            \n            <div class=\"subsection\">\n                <h3 class=\"subsection-title\">The Six Turnings</h3>\n                <div class=\"timeline-container\">\n                    <div class=\"timeline-line\"></div>\n                    \n                    <div class=\"timeline-item\">\n                        <div class=\"timeline-marker\"></div>\n                        <div class=\"timeline-content\">\n                            <h4 class=\"timeline-title\">TURNING 1: GLASS</h4>\n                            <p class=\"timeline-period\">N01-N05 • Fragile formation, first emergence</p>\n                            <p>Piercing event, Jhace-Tiffani partnership, Soulpulse discovery, Tiffani's death, Fathom Break triggers god awakening</p>\n                        </div>\n                    </div>\n                    \n                    <div class=\"timeline-item\">\n                        <div class=\"timeline-marker\"></div>\n                        <div class=\"timeline-content\">\n                            <h4 class=\"timeline-title\">TURNING 2: CRACK</h4>\n                            <p class=\"timeline-period\">N06-N10 • Collision of forces, fracture lines</p>\n                            <p>Gods 30-40% conscious, faction formation, fragmentary divine memories, political pressure mounts</p>\n                        </div>\n                    </div>\n                    \n                    <div class=\"timeline-item\">\n                        <div class=\"timeline-marker\"></div>\n                        <div class=\"timeline-content\">\n                            <h4 class=\"timeline-title\">TURNING 3: FORGE</h4>\n                            <p class=\"timeline-period\">N11-N15 • Hammering into shape, intense heat</p>\n                            <p>Gods 80-100% conscious, full divine memory restored, open divine warfare begins</p>\n                        </div>\n                    </div>\n                    \n                    <div class=\"timeline-item\">\n                        <div class=\"timeline-marker\"></div>\n                        <div class=\"timeline-content\">\n                            <h4 class=\"timeline-title\">TURNING 4: SMELT</h4>\n                            <p class=\"timeline-period\">N16-N20 • Melting down, purification</p>\n                            <p>N17: Public god revelation, full-scale divine warfare, Jhace develops lattice framework</p>\n                        </div>\n                    </div>\n                    \n                    <div class=\"timeline-item\">\n                        <div class=\"timeline-marker\"></div>\n                        <div class=\"timeline-content\">\n                            <h4 class=\"timeline-title\">TURNING 5: CLEAR</h4>\n                            <p class=\"timeline-period\">N21-N25 • Refinement, clarity emerging</p>\n                            <p>Lattice system developed, managed opposition, compromise emerging, balance framework tested</p>\n                        </div>\n                    </div>\n                    \n                    <div class=\"timeline-item\">\n                        <div class=\"timeline-marker\"></div>\n                        <div class=\"timeline-content\">\n                            <h4 class=\"timeline-title\">TURNING 6: BREAK</h4>\n                            <p class=\"timeline-period\">N26-N30 • Final shattering, ultimate transformation</p>\n                            <p>[RESERVED] Final confrontation and resolution, complete revelation</p>\n                        </div>\n                    </div>\n                </div>\n            </div>\n        </section>\n        \n        <!-- Themes Section -->\n        <section id=\"themes\" class=\"section fade-in\">\n            <h2 class=\"section-title\">Themes & Story Arcs</h2>\n            \n            <div class=\"subsection\">\n                <h3 class=\"subsection-title\">Core Themes</h3>\n                \n                <div class=\"collapsible\">\n                    <div class=\"collapsible-header\">\n                        <span class=\"collapsible-title\">1. Craft as Metaphor</span>\n                        <i class=\"fas fa-chevron-down collapsible-icon\"></i>\n                    </div>\n                    <div class=\"collapsible-content\">\n                        <p><strong>Glass-Making (Turning 1):</strong> Fragile formation, transparent but breakable. Tiffani's craft mirrors her perfectionism and vulnerability.</p>\n                        <p><strong>Metal-Forging (Turning 3):</strong> Hammering into shape through intense heat. Jhace's craft mirrors his approach to problems.</p>\n                        <p><strong>Dual Craft Journey:</strong> Both crafts require understanding stress, heat, and transformation. Both become tools of resistance against divine chaos.</p>\n                    </div>\n                </div>\n                \n                <div class=\"collapsible\">\n                    <div class=\"collapsible-header\">\n                        <span class=\"collapsible-title\">2. Partnership vs. Isolation</span>\n                        <i class=\"fas fa-chevron-down collapsible-icon\"></i>\n                    </div>\n                    <div class=\"collapsible-content\">\n                        <p><strong>Jhace's Isolation:</strong> Carries 23 names of dead from childhood trauma. Believes he must save everyone alone.</p>\n                        <p><strong>Tiffani's Isolation:</strong> Guilt over Marisse's death drives perfectionism. Works alone to prevent mistakes.</p>\n                        <p><strong>Load-Bearing System:</strong> They become structural support for each other. \"Remove one, both collapse.\"</p>\n                        <p><strong>Third Path:</strong> Neither institutional control (RRO) nor divine chaos (gods). Human collaboration as alternative.</p>\n                    </div>\n                </div>\n                \n                <div class=\"collapsible\">\n                    <div class=\"collapsible-header\">\n                        <span class=\"collapsible-title\">3. Cost of Power</span>\n                        <i class=\"fas fa-chevron-down collapsible-icon\"></i>\n                    </div>\n                    <div class=\"collapsible-content\">\n                        <p><strong>Visible Cost:</strong> Every Soulpulse use creates physical markers - tremors, vein-lines, exhaustion.</p>\n                        <p><strong>Exponential Cost:</strong> Each use costs more than the last. Users must learn efficiency or be destroyed.</p>\n                        <p><strong>Tiffani's Death:</strong> Ultimate cost - burnout from holding impossible structure. Her death saves others but destroys her.</p>\n                        <p><strong>Jhace's Survival:</strong> Must learn to bear cost without being consumed. Tiffani's death teaches him limits.</p>\n                    </div>\n                </div>\n                \n                <div class=\"collapsible\">\n                    <div class=\"collapsible-header\">\n                        <span class=\"collapsible-title\">4. Order vs. Chaos</span>\n                        <i class=\"fas fa-chevron-down collapsible-icon\"></i>\n                    </div>\n                    <div class=\"collapsible-content\">\n                        <p><strong>Form + Purity (Order):</strong> Structure, separation, judgment, perfection. Corlexi and Mobel represent institutional approach.</p>\n                        <p><strong>Wholeness + Entropy (Chaos):</strong> Connection, dissolution, unity, release. Salee and Eries represent boundary dissolution.</p>\n                        <p><strong>Jhace + Tiffani Balance:</strong> Form + Wholeness = Structural healing. Neither pure order nor pure chaos.</p>\n                        <p><strong>Divine Warfare:</strong> Four principles in cosmic conflict. Each god-vessel believes their principle is correct.</p>\n                    </div>\n                </div>\n                \n                <div class=\"collapsible\">\n                    <div class=\"collapsible-header\">\n                        <span class=\"collapsible-title\">5. Observation vs. Action</span>\n                        <i class=\"fas fa-chevron-down collapsible-icon\"></i>\n                    </div>\n                    <div class=\"collapsible-content\">\n                        <p><strong>Tiffani's Approach:</strong> Measure first, understand patterns, act with precision. \"Stone doesn't lie, neither do these marks.\"</p>\n                        <p><strong>Jhace's Approach:</strong> Act first, hold the structure, measure consequences later. \"Sometimes you have to choose who dies.\"</p>\n                        <p><strong>Auditor's Approach:</strong> Observe only, never intervene. False facade - actually orchestrating events.</p>\n                        <p><strong>Synthesis:</\nThe file is too long and its contents have been truncated.\n"
          ]
        },

transition: var(--transition-medium);\n[L263]             position: relative;\n[L264]             overflow: hidden;\n[L265]         }\n[L266]         \n[L267]         .character-card::before {\n[L268]             content: '';\n[L269]             position: absolute;\n[L270]             top: 0;\n[L271]             left: 0;\n[L272]             right: 0;\n[L273]             height: 4px;\n[L274]             background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--form-violet), var(--wholeness-amber), var(--purity-silver), var(--entropy-red));\n[L275]         }\n[L276]         \n[L277]         .character-card:hover {\n[L278]             transform: translateY(-5px);\n[L279]             border-color: var(--copper-patina);\n[L280]             box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(184, 115, 51, 0.3);\n[L281]         }\n[L282]         \n[L283]         .character-name {\n[L284]             font-family: var(--font-display);\n[L285]             font-size: 1.4rem;\n[L286]             color: var(--molten-gold);\n[L287]             margin-bottom: var(--spacing-sm);\n[L288]         }\n[L289]         \n[L290]         .character-role {\n[L291]             font-size: 0.9rem;\n[L292]             color: var(--copper-patina);\n[L293]             margin-bottom: var(--spacing-md);\n[L294]             font-weight: 500;\n[L295]         }\n[L296]         \n[L297]         .character-description {\n[L298]             font-size: 0.95rem;\n[L299]             line-height: 1.6;\n[L300]             color: var(--vellum);\n[L301]             opacity: 0.9;\n[L302]         }\n[L303]         \n[L304]         /* Timeline */\n[L305]         .timeline-container {\n[L306]             position: relative;\n[L307]             padding: var(--spacing-lg) 0;\n[L308]         }\n[L309]         \n[L310] {\n[L321]             position: relative;\n[L322]             margin-bottom: var(--spacing-xl);\n[L323]             padding: 0 var(--spacing-xl);\n[L324]         }\n[L325]         \n[L326] var(--spacing-md);\n[L342]             width: 20px;\n[L343]             height: 20px;\n[L344]             background: var(--molten-gold);\n[L345]             border: 3px solid var(--forge-black);\n[L346]             border-radius: 50%;\n[L347]             transform: translateX(-50%);\n[L348]             z-index: 2;\n[L349]         }\n[L350]         \n[L351]         .timeline-content {\n[L352]             background: rgba(26, 26, 26, 0.6);\n[L353]             padding: var(--spacing-lg);\n[L354]             border-radius: 8px;\n[L355]             border: 1px solid rgba(184, 115, 51, 0.3);\n[L356]         }\n[L357]         \n[L358]         .timeline-title {\n[L359]             font-family: var(--font-display);\n[L360]             font-size: 1.3rem;\n[L361] {\n[L571]             opacity: 0;\n[L572]             transform: translateY(30px);\n[L573]             transition: var(--transition-medium);\n[L574]         }\n[L575]         \n[L576] var(--font-display);\n[L588]             font-size: 1.5rem;\n[L589]             color: var(--molten-gold);\n[L590]         }\n[L591]         \n[L592]         .loading::after {\n[L593]             content: '';\n[L594]             width: 20px;\n[L595]             height: 20px;\n[L596]             border: 2px solid var(--copper-patina);\n[L597]             border-top: 2px solid var(--molten-gold);\n[L598]             border-radius: 50%;\n[L599]             animation: spin 1s linear infinite;\n[L600]             margin-left: var(--spacing-sm);\n[L601]         }\n[L602]         \n[L603]         @keyframes spin {\n[L604]             0% { transform: rotate(0deg); }\n[L605]             100% { transform: rotate(360deg); }\n[L606]         }\n[L607]         \n[L608]         /* Utility Classes */\n[L609]         .text-center { text-align: center; }\n[L610]         .text-gold { color: var(--molten-gold); }\n[L611]         .text-copper { color: var(--copper-patina); }\n[L612]         .text-violet { color: var(--form-violet); }\n[L613]         .text-amber { color: var(--wholeness-amber); }\n[L614]         .text-silver { color: var(--purity-silver); }\n[L615] }\n[L623]         .font-code { font-family: var(--font-code); }\n[L624]         .font-handwriting { font-family: var(--font-handwriting); }\n[L625]     </style>\n[L626] </head>\n[L627] <body>\n[L628]     <!-- Loading Screen -->\n[L629]     <div id=\"loading\" class=\"loading\">\n[L630]         Forging the Narrative\n[L631]     </div>\n[L632]     \n[L633]     <!-- Background Animation -->\n[L634]     <div id=\"vanta-bg\"></div>\n[L635]     \n[L636]     <!-- Navigation -->\n[L637]     <nav class=\"nav-container\">\n[L638]         <div class=\"nav-content\">\n[L639]             <div class=\"nav-title\">\n[L640]                 <i class=\"fas fa-book-open\"></i> OmniMeta Saga\n[L641]             </div>\n[L642]             <ul class=\"nav-menu\">\n[L643]                 <li class=\"nav-item\"><a href=\"#overview\">Overview</a></li>\n[L644]                 <li class=\"nav-item\"><a href=\"#characters\">Characters</a></li>\n[L645]                 <li class=\"nav-item\"><a href=\"#world\">World</a></li>\n[L646]                 <li class=\"nav-item\"><a href=\"#magic\">Magic</a></li>\n[L647]                 <li class=\"nav-item\"><a href=\"#timeline\">Timeline</a></li>\n[L648]                 <li class=\"nav-item\"><a href=\"#themes\">Themes</a></li>\n[L649]             </ul>\n[L650]         </div>\n[L651]     </nav>\n[L652]     \n[L653]     <!-- Main Content -->\n[L654]     <main class=\"main-container\">\n[L655]         <!-- Hero Section -->\n[L656]         <section class=\"hero-section fade-in\">\n[L657]             <h1 class=\"hero-title\">Super Exponential Story Bible</h1>\n[L658]             <p class=\"hero-subtitle\">Complete Narrative Universe Documentation</p>\n[L659]             <p class=\"hero-description\">\n[L660]                 A meticulously crafted 30-novella epic fantasy spanning six \"Turnings,\" \n[L661]                 following the evolution of Jhace Torrins from craftsman to god-slayer \n[L662]                 across approximately 6 years of his life. Every element serves the \n[L663]                 central themes of partnership, cost, and balance in a world where \n[L664]                 power always extracts its price.\n[L665]             </p>\n[L666]         </section>\n[L667]         \n[L668]         <!-- Saga Overview -->\n[L669]         <section id=\"overview\" class=\"section fade-in\">\n[L670]             <h2 class=\"section-title\">Saga Overview</h2>\n[L671]             \n[L672]             <div class=\"subsection\">\n[L673]                 <h3 class=\"subsection-title\">The Hidden Message</h3>\n[L674]                 <p>The 30 novella titles spell out a dual craft metaphor that mirrors the protagonist's spiritual journey:</p>\n[L675]                 <div class=\"magic-system\">\n[L676]                     <div class=\"principle-card\" data-principle=\"glass\">\n[L677]                         <div class=\"principle-icon\"><i class=\"fas fa-wine-glass\"></i></div>\n[L678]                         <h4 class=\"principle-name\">GLASS</h4>\n[L679]                         <p class=\"principle-verb\">Fragile formation, transparent but breakable</p>\n[L680]                     </div>\n[L681]                     <div class=\"principle-card\" data-principle=\"crack\">\n[L682]                         <div class=\"principle-icon\"><i class=\"fas fa-hammer\"></i></div>\n[L683]                         <h4 class=\"principle-name\">CRACK</h4>\n[L684]                         <p class=\"principle-verb\">Collision of forces, fracture lines appearing</p>\n[L685]                     </div>\n[L686]                     <div class=\"principle-card\" data-principle=\"forge\">\n[L687]                         <div class=\"principle-icon\"><i class=\"fas fa-fire\"></i></div>\n[L688]                         <h4 class=\"principle-name\">FORGE</h4>\n[L689]                         <p class=\"principle-verb\">Hammering into shape, intense heat, transformation</p>\n[L690]                     </div>\n[L691]                     <div class=\"principle-card\" data-principle=\"smelt\">\n[L692]                         <div class=\"principle-icon\"><i class=\"fas fa-industry\"></i></div>\n[L693]                         <h4 class=\"principle-name\">SMELT</h4>\n[L694]                         <p class=\"principle-verb\">Melting down, purification, separation</p>\n[L695]                     </div>\n[L696]                     <div class=\"principle-card\" data-principle=\"clear\">\n[L697]                         <div class=\"principle-icon\"><i class=\"fas fa-eye\"></i></div>\n[L698]                         <h4 class=\"principle-name\">CLEAR</h4>\n[L699]                         <p class=\"principle-verb\">Refinement, clarity emerging, truth visible</p>\n[L700]                     </div>\n[L701]                     <div class=\"principle-card\" data-principle=\"break\">\n[L702]                         <div class=\"principle-icon\"><i class=\"fas fa-bolt\"></i></div>\n[L703]                         <h4 class=\"principle-name\">BREAK</h4>\n[L704]                         <p class=\"principle-verb\">Final shattering, ultimate transformation</p>\n[L705]                     </div>\n[L706]                 </div>\n[L707]             </div>\n[L708]             \n[L709]             <div class=\"subsection\">\n[L710]                 <h3 class=\"subsection-title\">Core Premise</h3>\n[L711]                 <p>A mysterious projectile pierces completely through the planet Te'Oga, creating a permanent hole and fundamentally breaking planetary physics. This \"Piercing\" event awakens a dormant force called <strong>Soulpulse</strong> that did NOT exist before.</p>\n[L712]                 \n[L713]                 <div class=\"collapsible\">\n[L714]                     <div class=\"collapsible-header\">\n[L715]                         <span class=\"collapsible-title\">Physical Consequences</span>\n[L716]                         <i class=\"fas fa-chevron-down collapsible-icon\"></i>\n[L717]                     </div>\n[L718]                     <div class=\"collapsible-content\">\n[L719]                         <ul>\n[L720]                             <li>Axial tilt snapped to ~0° (no meaningful seasons)</li>\n[L721]                             <li>Catastrophic quakes and tsunamis reshape continents</li>\n[L722]                             <li>Permanent climate band disruption</li>\n[L723]                             <li>\"Scar storms\" near entry/exit wounds</li>\n[L724]                             <li>Resonance hotspots along damage path</li>\n[L725]                         </ul>\n[L726]                     </div>\n[L727]                 </div>\n[L728]                 \n[L729]                 <div class=\"collapsible\">\n[L730]                     <div class=\"collapsible-header\">\n[L731]                         <span class=\"collapsible-title\">Metaphysical Consequences</span>\n[L732]                         <i class=\"fas fa-chevron-down collapsible-icon\"></i>\n[L733]                     </div>\n[L734]                     <div class=\"collapsible-content\">\n[L735]                         <ul>\n[L736]                             <li><strong>Soulpulse/Resonance emerges for the first time</strong></li>\n[L737]                             <li>Conscious will can now affect matter</li>\n[L738]                             <li>Four ancient gods begin awakening in mortal forms</li>\n[L739]                             <li>The Auditor begins orchestrating events toward stasis</li>\n[L740]                         </ul>\n[L741]                     </div>\n[L742]                 </div>\n[L743]             </div>\n[L744]         </section>\n[L745]         \n[L746]         <!-- Characters Section -->\n[L747]         <section id=\"characters\" class=\"section fade-in\">\n[L748]             <h2 class=\"section-title\">Character Profiles</h2>\n[L749]             \n[L750]             <div class=\"subsection\">\n[L751]                 <h3 class=\"subsection-title\">Protagonists</h3>\n[L752]                 <div class=\"character-grid\">\n[L753]                     <div class=\"character-card\">\n[L754]                         <h4 class=\"character-name\">Jhace Torrins</h4>\n[L755]                         <p class=\"character-role\">The Craftsman Savior</p>\n[L756]                         <div class=\"character-description\">\n[L757]                             <strong>Age (N01):</strong> 28 turns<br>\n[L758]                             <strong>Craft:</strong> Forge-smith (gridwright), infrastructure specialist<br>\n[L759]                             <strong>Psychological Wound:</strong> Survivor's guilt - parents died in structural collapse at age 7, carries 23 names of the dead<br>\n[L760]                             <strong>Core Drive:</strong> Obsessive need to save everyone, prevent all deaths through vigilance<br>\n[L761]                             <strong>Soulpulse Alignment:</strong> Primarily FORM (holding, stabilizing, structural integrity)<br>\n[L762]                             <strong>Character Arc:</strong> Isolated savior → Collaborative leader → God-confronter\n[L763]                         </div>\n[L764]                     </div>\n[L765]                     \n[L766]                     <div class=\"character-card\">\n[L767]                         <h4 class=\"character-name\">Tiffani Merrow</h4>\n[L768]                         <p class=\"character-role\">The Perfectionist</p>\n[L769]                         <div class=\"character-description\">\n[L770]                             <strong>Age (N01):</strong> 26 turns<br>\n[L771]                             <strong>Craft:</strong> Glassworker, precision measurement and structural analysis<br>\n[L772]                             <strong>Psychological Wound:</strong> Guilt over friend Marisse's death in glasshouse accident (miscalculation)<br>\n[L773]                             <strong>Core Drive:</strong> Perfectionism, belief that vigilance alone prevents catastrophe<br>\n[L774]                             <strong>Soulpulse Alignment:</strong> Primarily WHOLENESS (mending, connecting, restoring)<br>\n[L775]                             <strong>Ultimate Fate:</strong> Dies in N05 from Soulpulse burnout holding catastrophic structural failure\n[L776]                         </div>\n[L777]                     </div>\n[L778]                 </div>\n[L779]             </div>\n[L780]             \n[L781]             <div class=\"subsection\">\n[L782]                 <h3 class=\"subsection-title\">The Four God-Vessels</h3>\n[L783]                 <div class=\"magic-system\">\n[L784]                     <div class=\"principle-card\" data-principle=\"form\">\n[L785]                         <div class=\"principle-icon\"><i class=\"fas fa-cube\"></i></div>\n[L786]                         <h4 class=\"principle-name\">Corlexi (Xilcore)</h4>\n[L787]                         <p class=\"principle-verb\">FORM - Hold, stabilize, impose structure</p>\n[L788]                         <p>God of structure, order, frameworks. Cost: Muscle ache, joint stiffness, rigid tension.     "a2b15529-af86-4231-b81e-9d2207579be5": {

        "channel": null,
        "content": {
          "content_type": "execution_output",
          "text": "\n==== Interlude-Generation-Template-UPDATED.md ====\n# INTERLUDE GENERATION TEMPLATE\n## God-Vessel POV: Tactical Execution Guide\n\n**Version:** 1.0  \n**Purpose:** Bridge Bible interlude specifications to actual god-vessel perspective prose  \n**Use:** Apply to all interludes (Interlude I and II per novella, N01-N30)  \n\n---\n\n## TEMPLATE OVERVIEW\n\nInterludes operate under fundamentally different rules than chapters. They provide reader access to god-vessel perspectives that reveal more than mortal POV chapters while maintaining innocent frame discipline. The god-vessels themselves don't yet understand their divine natureâ€”they experience extraordinary capacity and bias-driven compulsions but interpret these through mortal frameworks.\n\n**Core Principle:** Show readers that god-vessels are different without the god-vessels knowing they're different.\n\n**Structural Function:** Interludes exist outside the main narrative timeline to provide atmospheric texture, thematic resonance, and gradual revelation of divine awakening without disrupting chapter momentum.\n\n---\n\n## SECTION 1: PRE-GENERATION SETUP\n\n### Required Inputs (Check All Before Starting)\n\n**From Bible Section 5 (Interlude Placement):**\n- [ ] Interlude designation (I or II)\n- [ ] Placement (after which chapter)\n- [ ] Type (Build-Up or Break-Down)\n- [ ] POV god-vessels (which two, what order)\n- [ ] Purpose statement (what this interlude reveals)\n- [ ] Tone specification (prophetic, sensory, calculating, etc.)\n\n**From Character State Table:**\n- [ ] Each god-vessel's current Soulpulse capacity level\n- [ ] Their mortal alias and appearance details\n- [ ] Their Principle bias (Form, Wholeness, Purity, Entropy)\n- [ ] Their current activity/location in world\n- [ ] Their psychological state and ideological certainty\n\n**From Knowledge Gate Compliance:**\n- [ ] What god-vessels CAN perceive at this point\n- [ ] What they CANNOT yet understand about themselves\n- [ ] Which divine names are forbidden (usually all until N17+)\n- [ ] Whether they sense each other yet (timeline dependent)\n\n**From Previous Interludes:**\n- [ ] What sensory signatures have been used before\n- [ ] Which god-vessel pairings have appeared\n- [ ] What progression of awareness has been established\n- [ ] Tone patterns to avoid repeating\n\n### Pre-Generation Questions\n\nBefore writing, answer these:\n\n1. **What does this interlude DO for the novella?** (Atmospheric break, thematic reinforcement, foreshadowing, world-building)\n2. **What progression of divine awareness does this show?** (Are they more self-aware than previous interludes?)\n3. **How does each god-vessel's Principle bias manifest in their perception?** (What do they notice that mortals don't?)\n4. **What is the emotional throughline connecting the two POV segments?** (They should resonate thematically even if contrasting in content)\n5. **How does this interlude connect to the surrounding chapters without disrupting pacing?** (Atmospheric callback, thematic parallel, future setup)\n\n---\n\n## SECTION 2: STRUCTURAL ARCHITECTURE\n\n### Word Count Distribution (600-900 words total)\n\n**Standard Two-Part Structure:**\n- Opening sensory immersion (50-100 words): Establish god-vessel POV through overwhelming sensory detail\n- First god-vessel segment (250-350 words): Complete scene showing their perspective and bias manifestation\n- Transition/break (10-30 words): Visual separator or tonal shift marker\n- Second god-vessel segment (250-350 words): Contrasting or complementary scene with different god-vessel\n- Closing resonance (40-70 words): Thematic or atmospheric note that bridges back toward chapter momentum\n\n**Build-Up Type Interludes:**\nThese appear earlier in the novella and establish tension, possibility, or growing awareness. They should feel like the world is opening up, like forces are gathering, like something is beginning to coalesce. The god-vessels notice things, feel pulls, experience compulsions, but don't yet act decisively on them.\n\n**Break-Down Type Interludes:**\nThese appear later in the novella and show consequences, exhaustion, or recognition of limits. They should feel like the world is pressing down, like forces are becoming clearer but more dangerous, like awareness is sharpening into something that demands response. The god-vessels are moving from noticing to understanding patterns, from feeling pulls to making choices based on those pulls.\n\n### Alternating POV Structure\n\n==== Epilogue-Generation-Template-UPDATED.md ====\n# EPILOGUE GENERATION TEMPLATE\n## Auditor POV: Tactical Execution Guide\n\n**Version:** 1.0  \n**Purpose:** Bridge Bible epilogue specifications to Auditor perspective prose  \n**Use:** Apply to all epilogues (one per novella, N01-N30)  \n\n---\n\n## TEMPLATE OVERVIEW\n\nEpilogues provide the only guilty frame perspective in innocent frame novellas N01-N29. The Auditor observes events with full knowledge of cosmic context but reveals that knowledge through tone and implication rather than through exposition. The voice must be sardonic, intellectually curious, emotionally detached, and faintly contemptuous while creating intrigue about what the Auditor knows without actually explaining it.\n\n**Core Principle:** Show that the Auditor knows more without revealing what they know.\n\n**Structural Function:** Epilogues exist as coda to each novella, providing atmospheric distance from mortal concerns while planting seeds of larger cosmic architecture without disrupting innocent frame discipline for readers.\n\n---\n\n## SECTION 1: UNDERSTANDING THE AUDITOR\n\n### Who/What the Auditor Is (Canonical Facts)\n\n**Guilty Frame Truth (Known to You, Hidden from Readers N01-N29):**\n- Auditor = Counter-Spark (revealed N30 only)\n- Motivation: Universal stasis (all motion/change must cease)\n- Method: Orchestrating divine conflict to exhaust all parties\n- Piercing: Deliberately created weapon, not cosmic accident\n- Relationship to events: Active orchestrator masquerading as passive observer\n\n**Innocent Frame Presentation (What Readers Experience N01-N29):**\n- Mysterious observer cataloging events\n- Identity unknown, purpose unclear\n- Appears detached but shows signs of investment in outcomes\n- Speaks with knowledge of contexts mortals don't access\n- Sometimes amused, sometimes frustrated, always watching\n\n### The Auditor's Voice Signature\n\nThe Auditor speaks with distinctive qualities that must remain consistent across all thirty epilogues:\n\n**Sardonic:** Finds dark humor in mortal behavior, divine pretensions, inevitable failures. Not cruel exactly, but unsympathetic. The universe is absurd; the Auditor notices.\n\n**Intellectually Curious:** Genuinely interested in whether certain developments surprise expectations. Treats events as data points in ongoing observation. Clinical but engaged.\n\n**Emotionally Detached:** Does not experience empathy or connection with observed subjects. Views mortals and gods as phenomena to catalog rather than as beings deserving care. Distance creates coldness.\n\n**Faintly Contemptuous:** Slight disdain for both mortal limitations and divine arrogance. Nothing impresses the Auditor because the Auditor has seen everything before. But occasionally something is \"interesting\" enough to warrant note.\n\n**Precise:** Uses exact language, specific observations, measured assessments. No emotional inflation, no metaphorical indulgence. The Auditor documents with academic precision.\n\n**Withholding:** Implies knowledge without sharing it. References \"larger patterns\" and \"inevitable outcomes\" without explaining what patterns or which outcomes. Creates curiosity through gaps.\n\n---\n\n## SECTION 2: PRE-GENERATION SETUP\n\n### Required Inputs (Check All Before Starting)\n\n**From Bible Section 5 (Epilogue Placement):**\n- [ ] Placement (always after final chapter)\n- [ ] Purpose statement (what this epilogue observes)\n- [ ] Tone specification (typically sardonic/observational)\n- [ ] Key observations to include (specific characters or events to note)\n\n**From Novella Content:**\n- [ ] Major events of this novella (what happened)\n- [ ] Character developments (who changed, how)\n- [ ] Relationship progression (especially Jhace/Tiffani)\n- [ ] God-vessel activities (what divine fragments did)\n- [ ] Political shifts (faction power changes)\n\n**From Knowledge Gate Boundaries:**\n- [ ] What Auditor CAN reference (cosmic context, orchestration, divine war)\n- [ ] What Auditor MUST NOT reveal explicitly (Counter-Spark identity N30 only, specific future plot points, exact nature of stasis plan)\n- [ ] Level of dramatic irony appropriate to novella position\n\n**From Previous Epilogues:**\n- [ ] What observations have been made before\n- [ ] Tone patterns to maintain or vary\n\n==== Non-Chapter-Validator-UPDATED.md ====\n# NON-CHAPTER VALIDATOR: INTERLUDE & EPILOGUE COMPLIANCE CHECKER\n\n**Version:** 1.0  \n**Purpose:** Verify interludes and epilogues meet their specific structural, voice, and canon constraints  \n**Use:** Run this checklist on EVERY interlude and epilogue before integration  \n\n---\n\n## VALIDATOR TYPE SELECTION\n\n**What are you validating?**\n- [ ] Interlude (god-vessel POV, two segments)\n- [ ] Epilogue (Auditor POV, single perspective)\n\nSelect type above, then proceed to appropriate validation section.\n\n---\n\n## SECTION 1: INTERLUDE VALIDATION\n\n### Pre-Check: Load Interlude Context\n\n**Interlude Being Validated:**\n- [ ] Novella: N[XX]\n- [ ] Interlude Designation: I or II\n- [ ] Placement: After Chapter [#]\n- [ ] Type: Build-Up / Break-Down\n- [ ] POV God-Vessels: [Name] and [Name]\n- [ ] Word Count: [Actual count]\n\n---\n\n### 1A: Word Count Compliance\n\n**RULE:** 600-900 words total for interlude\n\n- [ ] **Word count is between 600-900 words** âœ“ PASS / âœ— FAIL\n  - Actual count: _______ words\n  - If FAIL: Trim or expand to range\n\n**CRITICAL:** This is non-negotiable for interludes. Different from chapter word count (600-900).\n\n---\n\n### 1B: Structural Compliance\n\n**Two-Segment Structure Required:**\n\n- [ ] Opening sensory immersion present (50-100 words)\n- [ ] First god-vessel segment complete (250-350 words)\n- [ ] Clear transition/break between segments\n- [ ] Second god-vessel segment complete (250-350 words)\n- [ ] Closing resonance present (40-70 words)\n\n**POV Alternation:**\n- [ ] First segment establishes god-vessel POV immediately (within first sentence)\n- [ ] Second segment establishes different god-vessel POV immediately\n- [ ] No head-hopping within segments (each maintains single perspective)\n- [ ] POV markers clear at segment openings\n\n**Type Compliance:**\n- [ ] If Build-Up: Shows tension/possibility/gathering forces\n- [ ] If Break-Down: Shows consequences/exhaustion/recognition\n\n---\n\n### 1C: Voice Requirements\n\n**Sensory Overwhelm Technique:**\n- [ ] Sensory density higher than chapter prose\n- [ ] Multiple sense inputs processed simultaneously\n- [ ] Overwhelming detail remains narratively coherent (not incomprehensible blur)\n- [ ] Every abstract perception has concrete physical anchor\n- [ ] Sensory detail specific, not generic\n\n**Principle Bias Manifestation:**\n- [ ] Each god-vessel perceives through their Principle filter\n- [ ] First god-vessel's bias (Form/Wholeness/Purity/Entropy) shapes what they notice\n- [ ] Second god-vessel's bias clearly different from first\n- [ ] Bias influences not just observation but interpretation\n"
        },
