1200px;\n[L154]             margin-left: auto;\n[L155]             margin-right: auto;\n[L156]         }\n[L157]         \n[L158]         /* Hero Section */\n[L159]         .hero-section {\n[L160]             text-align: center;\n[L161]             padding: var(--spacing-xl) 0;\n[L162]             margin-bottom: var(--spacing-xl);\n[L163]             position: relative;\n[L164]         }\n[L165]         \n[L166]         .hero-title {\n[L167]             font-family: var(--font-display);\n[L168]             font-size: 4rem;\n[L169]             font-weight: 700;\n[L170]             color: var(--molten-gold);\n[L171]             text-shadow: 3px 3px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.7);\n[L172]             margin-bottom: var(--spacing-md);\n[L173]             letter-spacing: 2px;\n[L174]         }\n[L175]         \n[L176]         .hero-subtitle {\n[L177]             font-size: 1.4rem;\n[L178]             color: var(--copper-patina);\n[L179]             margin-bottom: var(--spacing-lg);\n[L180]             font-weight: 400;\n[L181]         }\n[L182]         \n[L183]         .hero-description {\n[L184]             font-size: 1.1rem;\n[L185]             max-width: 800px;\n[L186]             margin: 0 auto;\n[L187]             line-height: 1.8;\n[L188]             color: var(--vellum);\n[L189]             opacity: 0.9;\n[L190]         }\n[L191]         \n[L192]         /* Section Styling */\n[L193]         .section {\n[L194]             margin-bottom: var(--spacing-xl);\n[L195]             padding: var(--spacing-xl);\n[L196]             background: rgba(45, 45, 45, 0.6);\n[L197]             border-radius: 12px;\n[L198]             border: 1px solid rgba(184, 115, 51, 0.3);\n[L199]             backdrop-filter: blur(5px);\n[L200]             position: relative;\n[L201]             overflow: hidden;\n[L202]         }\n[L203]         \n[L204]         .section::before {\n[L205]             content: '';\n[L206]             position: absolute;\n[L207]             top: 0;\n[L208]             left: 0;\n[L209]             right: 0;\n[L210]             height: 3px;\n[L211]             background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--copper-patina), var(--molten-gold), var(--ember-orange));\n[L212]         }\n[L213]         \n[L214]         .section-title {\n[L215]             font-family: var(--font-display);\n[L216]             font-size: 2.2rem;\n[L217]             color: var(--molten-gold);\n[L218]             margin-bottom: var(--spacing-lg);\n[L219]             text-align: center;\n[L220]             position: relative;\n[L221]         }\n[L222]         \n[L223]         .section-title::after {\n[L224]             content: '';\n[L225]             position: absolute;\n[L226]             bottom: -8px;\n[L227]             left: 50%;\n[L228]             width: 60px;\n[L229]             height: 2px;\n[L230]             background: var(--copper-patina);\n[L231]             transform: translateX(-50%);\n[L232]         }\n[L233]         \n[L234]         .subsection {\n[L235]             margin-bottom: var(--spacing-lg);\n[L236]             padding: var(--spacing-lg);\n[L237]             background: rgba(26, 26, 26, 0.4);\n[L238]             border-radius: 8px;\n[L239]             border-left: 4px solid var(--copper-patina);\n[L240]         }\n[L241]         \n[L242]         .subsection-title {\n[L243]             font-family: var(--font-display);\n[L244]             font-size: 1.6rem;\n[L245]             color: var(--copper-patina);\n[L246]             margin-bottom: var(--spacing-md);\n[L247]         }\n[L248]         \n[L249]         /* Character Cards */\n[L250]         .character-grid {\n[L251]             display: grid;\n[L252]             grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(350px, 1fr));\n[L253]             gap: var(--spacing-lg);\n[L254]             margin-top: var(--spacing-lg);\n[L255]         }\n[L256]         \n[L257]         .character-card {\n[L258]             background: rgba(26, 26, 26, 0.7);\n[L259]             border-radius: 12px;\n[L260]             padding: var(--spacing-lg);\n[L261]             border: 2px solid var(--steel-gray);\n[L262]             transition: var(--transition-medium);\n[L263]             position: relative;\n[L264]             overflow: hidden;\n[L265]         }\n[L266]         \n[L267]         .character-card::before {\n[L268]             content: '';\n[L269]             position: absolute;\n[L270]             top: 0;\n[L271]             left: 0;\n[L272]             right: 0;\n[L273]             height: 4px;\n[L274]             background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--form-violet), var(--wholeness-amber), var(--purity-silver), var(--entropy-red));\n[L275]         }\n[L276]         \n[L277]         .character-card:hover {\n[L278]             transform: translateY(-5px);\n[L279]             border-color: var(--copper-patina);\n[L280]             box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(184, 115, 51, 0.3);\n[L281]         }\n[L282]         \n[L283]         .character-name {\n[L284]             font-family: var(--font-display);\n[L285]             font-size: 1.4rem;\n[L286]             color: var(--molten-gold);\n[L287]             margin-bottom: var(--spacing-sm);\n[L288]         }\n[L289]         \n[L290]         .character-role {\n[L291]             font-size: 0.9rem;\n[L292]             color: var(--copper-patina);\n[L293]             margin-bottom: var(--spacing-md);\n[L294]             font-weight: 500;\n[L295]         }\n[L296]         \n[L297]         .character-description {\n[L298]             font-size: 0.95rem;\n[L299]             line-height: 1.6;\n[L300]             color: var(--vellum);\n[L301]             opacity: 0.9;\n[L302]         }\n[L303]         \n[L304]         /* Timeline */\n[L305]         .timeline-container {\n[L306]             position: relative;\n[L307]             padding: var(--spacing-lg) 0;\n[L308]         }\n[L309]         \n[L310]         .timeline-line {\n[L311]             position: absolute;\n[L312]             left: 50%;\n[L313]             top: 0;\n[L314]             bottom: 0;\n[L315]             width: 4px;\n[L316] {\n[L321]             position: relative;\n[L322]             margin-bottom: var(--spacing-xl);\n[L323]             padding: 0 var(--spacing-xl);\n[L324]         }\n[L325]         \n[L326] }\n[L331]         \n[L332]         .timeline-item:nth-child(even) .timeline-content {\n[L333]             margin-left: 50%;\n[L334]             padding-left: var(--spacing-lg);\n[L335]             text-align: left;\n[L336]         }\n[L337]         \n[L338]         .timeline-marker {\n[L339]             position: absolute;\n[L340]             left: 50%;\n[L341]             top: var(--forge-black);\n[L346]             border-radius: 50%;\n[L347]             transform: translateX(-50%);\n[L348]             z-index: 2;\n[L349]         }\n[L350]         \n[L351]         .timeline-content {\n[L352]             background: rgba(26, 26, 26, 0.6);\n[L353]             padding: var(--spacing-lg);\n[L354]             border-radius: 8px;\n[L355]             border: 1px solid rgba(184, 115, 51, 0.3);\n[L356]         }\n[L357]         \n[L358]         .timeline-title {\n[L359]             font-family: var(--font-display);\n[L360]             font-size: 1.3rem;\n[L361] /* Magic System Visualization */\n[L373]         .magic-system {\n[L374]             display: grid;\n[L375]             grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);\n[L376]             gap: 0.7);\n[L382]             border-radius: 12px;\n[L383]             padding: var(--spacing-lg);\n[L384]             text-align: center;\n[L385]             transition: var(--transition-medium);\n[L386] position: absolute;\n[L393]             top: 0;\n[L394]             left: 0;\n[L395]             right: 0;\n[L396]             height: 4px;\n[L397]             background:    transition: var(--transition-fast);\n[L463]         }\n[L464]         \n[L465]         .collapsible-header:hover {\n[L466]             background: rgba(184, 115, 51, 0.3);\n[L467]         }\n[L468] {\n[L571]             opacity: 0;\n[L572]             transform: translateY(30px);\n[L573]             transition: var(--transition-medium);\n[L574]         }\n[L575]         \n[L576]         .fade-in.visible {\n[L577]             opacity: 1;\n[L578]             transform: translateY(0);\n[L579]         }\n[L580]         \n[L581]         /* Loading Animation */\n[L582]         .loading {\n[L583]             display: flex;\n[L584]             justify-content: center;\n[L585]             align-items: center;\n[L586]             height: 100vh;\n[L587]             font-family: var(--font-display);\n[L588]             font-size: 1.5rem;\n[L589]             color: var(--molten-gold);\n[L590]         }\n[L591]         \n[L592]         .loading::after {\n[L593]             content: '';\n[L594]             width: 20px;\n[L595]             height: 20px;\n[L596]             border: 2px solid var(--copper-patina);\n[L597]             border-top: 2px solid var(--molten-gold);\n[L598]             border-radius: 50%;\n[L599]             animation: spin 1s linear infinite;\n[L600]             margin-left: var(--spacing-sm);\n[L601]         }\n[L602]         \n[L603]         @keyframes spin {\n[L604]             0% { transform: rotate(0deg); }\n[L605]             100% { transform: rotate(360deg); }\n[L606]         }\n[L607]         \n[L608]         /* Utility Classes */\n[L609]         .text-center { text-align: center; }\n[L610]         .text-gold { color: var(--molten-gold); }\n[L611]         .text-copper { color: var(--copper-patina); }\n[L612]         .text-violet { color: var(--form-violet); }\n[L613]         .text-amber { color: var(--wholeness-amber); }\n[L614]         .text-silver { color: var(--purity-silver); }\n[L615]         .text-red { color: var(--entropy-red); }\n[L616]         \n[L617]         .bg-dark { background: rgba(26, 26, 26, 0.8); }\n[L618]         .bg-medium { background: rgba(45, 45, 45, 0.6); }\n[L619]         .bg-light { background: rgba(74, 74, 74, 0.4); }\n[L620]         \n[L621]         .font-display { font-family: var(--font-display); }\n[L622]         .font-body { font-family: var(--font-body); }\n[L623]         .font-code { font-family: var(--font-code); }\n[L624]         .font-handwriting { font-family: var(--font-handwriting); }\n[L625]     </style>\n[L626] </head>\n[L627] <body>\n[L628]     <!-- Loading Screen -->\n[L629]     <div id=\"loading\" class=\"loading\">\n[L630]         Forging the Narrative\n[L631]     </div>\n[L632]     \n[L633]     <!-- Background Animation -->\n[L634]     <div id=\"vanta-bg\"></div>\n[L635]     \n[L636]     <!-- Navigation -->\n[L637]     <nav class=\"nav-container\">\n[L638]         <div class=\"nav-content\">\n[L639]             <div class=\"nav-title\">\n[L640]                 <i class=\"fas fa-book-open\"></i> OmniMeta Saga\n[L641]             </div>\n[L642]             <ul class=\"nav-menu\">\n[L643]                 <li class=\"nav-item\"><a href=\"#overview\">Overview</a></li>\n[L644]                 <li class=\"nav-item\"><a href=\"#characters\">Characters</a></li>\n[L645]                 <li class=\"nav-item\"><a href=\"#world\">World</a></li>\n[L646]                 <li class=\"nav-item\"><a href=\"#magic\">Magic</a></li>\n[L647]                 <li class=\"nav-item\"><a href=\"#timeline\">Timeline</a></li>\n[L648]                 <li class=\"nav-item\"><a href=\"#themes\">Themes</a></li>\n[L649]             </ul>\n[L650]         </div>\n[L651]     </nav>\n[L652]     \n[L653]     <!-- Main Content -->\n[L654]     <main class=\"main-container\">\n[L655]         <!-- Hero Section -->\n[L656]         <section class=\"hero-section fade-in\">\n[L657]             <h1 class=\"hero-title\">Super Exponential Story Bible</h1>\n[L658]             <p class=\"hero-subtitle\">Complete Narrative Universe Documentation</p>\n[L659]             <p class=\"hero-description\">\n[L660]                 A meticulously crafted 30-novella epic fantasy spanning six \"Turnings,\" \n[L661]                 following the evolution of Jhace Torrins from craftsman to god-slayer \n[L662]                 across approximately 6 years of his life. Every element serves the \n[L663]                 central themes of partnership, cost, and balance in a world where \n[L664]                 power always extracts its price.\n[L665]             </p>\n[L666]         </section>\n[L667]         \n[L668]         <!-- Saga Overview -->\n[L669]         <section id=\"overview\" class=\"section fade-in\">\n[L670]             <h2 class=\"section-title\">Saga Overview</h2>\n[L671]             \n[L672]             <div class=\"subsection\">\n[L673]                 <h3 class=\"subsection-title\">The Hidden Message</h3>\n[L674]                 <p>The 30 novella titles spell out a dual craft metaphor that mirrors the protagonist's spiritual journey:</p>\n[L675]                 <div class=\"magic-system\">\n[L676]                     <div class=\"principle-card\" data-principle=\"glass\">\n[L677]                         <div class=\"principle-icon\"><i class=\"fas fa-wine-glass\"></i></div>\n[L678]                         <h4 class=\"principle-name\">GLASS</h4>\n[L679]                         <p class=\"principle-verb\">Fragile formation, transparent but breakable</p>\n[L680]                     </div>\n[L681]                     <div class=\"principle-card\" data-principle=\"crack\">\n[L682]                         <div class=\"principle-icon\"><i class=\"fas fa-hammer\"></i></div>\n[L683]                         <h4 class=\"principle-name\">CRACK</h4>\n[L684]                         <p class=\"principle-verb\">Collision of forces, fracture lines appearing</p>\n[L685]                     </div>\n[L686]                     <div class=\"principle-card\" data-principle=\"forge\">\n[L687]                         <div class=\"principle-icon\"><i class=\"fas fa-fire\"></i></div>\n[L688]                         <h4 class=\"principle-name\">FORGE</h4>\n[L689]                         <p class=\"principle-verb\">Hammering into shape, intense heat, transformation</p>\n[L690]                     </div>\n[L691]                     <div class=\"principle-card\" data-principle=\"smelt\">\n[L692]                         <div class=\"principle-icon\"><i class=\"fas fa-industry\"></i></div>\n[L693]                         <h4 class=\"principle-name\">SMELT</h4>\n[L694]                         <p class=\"principle-verb\">Melting down, purification, separation</p>\n[L695]                     </div>\n[L696]                     <div class=\"principle-card\" data-principle=\"clear\">\n[L697]                         <div class=\"principle-icon\"><i class=\"fas fa-eye\"></i></div>\n[L698]                         <h4 class=\"principle-name\">CLEAR</h4>\n[L699]                         <p class=\"principle-verb\">Refinement, clarity emerging, truth visible</p>\n[L700]                     </div>\n[L701]                     <div class=\"principle-card\" data-principle=\"break\">\n[L702]                         <div class=\"principle-icon\"><i class=\"fas fa-bolt\"></i></div>\n[L703]                         <h4 class=\"principle-name\">BREAK</h4>\n[L704]                         <p class=\"principle-verb\">Final shattering, ultimate transformation</p>\n[L705]                     </div>\n[L706]                 </div>\n[L707]             </div>\n[L708]             \n[L709]             <div class=\"subsection\">\n[L710]                 <h3 class=\"subsection-title\">Core Premise</h3>\n[L711]                 <p>A mysterious projectile pierces completely through the planet Te'Oga, creating a permanent hole and fundamentally breaking planetary physics. This \"Piercing\" event awakens a dormant force called <strong>Soulpulse</strong> that did NOT exist before.</p>\n[L712]                 \n[L713]                 <div class=\"collapsible\">\n[L714]                     <div class=\"collapsible-header\">\n[L715]                         <span class=\"collapsible-title\">Physical Consequences</span>\n[L716]                         <i class=\"fas fa-chevron-down collapsible-icon\"></i>\n[L717]                     </div>\n[L718]                     <div class=\"collapsible-content\">\n[L719]                         <ul>\n[L720]             <div class=\"subsection\">\n[L782]                 <h3 class=\"subsection-title\">The Four God-Vessels</h3>\n[L783]                 <div class=\"magic-system\">\n[L784]                     <div class=\"principle-card\" data-principle=\"form\">\n[L785]                         <div class=\"principle-icon\"><i class=\"fas fa-cube\"></i></div>\n[L786]                         <h4 class=\"principle-name\">Corlexi (Xilcore)</h4>\n[L787]                         <p class=\"principle-verb\">FORM - Hold, stabilize, impose structure</p>\n[L788]                         <p>God of structure, order, frameworks. Cost: Muscle ache, joint stiffness, rigid tension. Cost: Empathy overload, emotional drain. Danger: Boundary dissolution, compassion paralysis.</p>\n[L796]                     </div>\n[L797]                     \n[L798]                     <div class=\"principle-card\" data-principle=\"purity\">\n[L799]                         <div class=\"principle-icon\"><i class=\"fas fa-gem\"></i></div>\n[L800]                         <h4 class=\"principle-name\">Mobel (Blemo)</h4>\n[L801]                         <p class=\"principle-verb\">PURITY - Refine, distill, isolate essence</p>\n[L802]                         <p>God of perfection, separation, righteousness. Cost: Migraine, hyper-focus burnout. Danger: Obsessive perfectionism, isolation.</p>\n[L803]                     </div>\n[L804]                     \n[L805]                     <div class=\"principle-card\" data-principle=\"entropy\">\n[L806]                         <div class=\"principle-icon\"><i class=\"fas fa-skull\"></i></div>\n[L807]                         <h4 class=\"principle-name\">Eries (Seeri)</h4>\n[L808]                         <p class=\"principle-verb\">ENTROPY - Undo, release, accelerate decay</p>\n[L809]                         <p>God of endings, release, natural decay. Cost: Numbness, apathy, dissociation. Danger: Nihilism, destructive spirals.</p>\n[L810]                     </div>\n[L811]                 </div>\n[L812]             </div>\n[L813]             \n[L814]             <div id=\"themes\" class=\"section fade-in\">\n[L1024]             <h2 class=\"section-title\">Themes & Story Arcs</h2>\n[L1025]             \n[L1026]             <div class=\"subsection\">\n[L1027]                 <h3 class=\"subsection-title\">Core Themes</h3>\n[L1028]                 \n[L1029]                 <div class=\"collapsible\">\n[L1030]                     <div class=\"collapsible-header\">\n[L1031]                         <span class=\"collapsible-title\">1. Craft as Metaphor</span>\n[L1032]                         <i class=\"fas fa-chevron-down collapsible-icon\"></i>\n[L1033]                     </div>\n[L1034]                     <div class=\"collapsible-content\">\n[L1035]                         <p><strong>Glass-Making (Turning 1):</strong> Fragile formation, transparent but breakable. Tiffani's craft mirrors her perfectionism and vulnerability.</p>\n[L1036]                         <p><strong>Metal-Forging (Turning 3):</strong> Hammering into shape through intense heat. Jhace's craft mirrors his approach to problems.</p>\n[L1037]                         <p><strong>Dual Craft Journey:</strong> Both crafts require understanding stress, heat, and transformation. Both become tools of resistance against divine chaos.</p>\n[L1038]                     </div>\n[L1039]                 </div>\n[L1040]                 \n[L1041]                 <div class=\"collapsible\">\n[L1042]                     <div class=\"collapsible-header\">\n[L1043]                         <span class=\"collapsible-title\">2. Partnership vs. Isolation</span>\n[L1044]                         <i class=\"fas fa-chevron-down collapsible-icon\"></i>\n[L1045]                     </div>\n[L1046]                     <div class=\"collapsible-content\">\n[L1047]                         <p><strong>Jhace's Isolation:</strong> Carries 23 names of dead from childhood trauma. Believes he must save everyone alone.</p>\n[L1048]                         <p><strong>Tiffani's Isolation:</strong> Guilt over Marisse's death drives perfectionism. Works alone to prevent mistakes.</p>\n[L1049]                         <p><strong>Load-Bearing System:</strong> They become structural support for each other. \"Remove one, both collapse.\"</p>\n[L1050]                         <p><strong>Third Path:</strong> Neither institutional control (RRO) nor divine chaos (gods). Human collaboration as alternative.</p>\n[L1051]                     </div>\n[L1052]                 </div>\n[L1053]                 \n[L1054]                 <div class=\"collapsible\">\n[L1055]                     <div class=\"collapsible-header\">\n[L1056]                         <span class=\"collapsible-title\">3. Cost of Power</span>\n[L1057]                         <i class=\"fas fa-chevron-down collapsible-icon\"></i>\n[L1058]                     </div>\n[L1059]                     <div class=\"collapsible-content\">\n[L1060]                         <p><strong>Visible Cost:</strong> Every Soulpulse use creates physical markers - tremors, vein-lines, exhaustion.</p>\n[L1061]                         <p><strong>Exponential Cost:</strong> Each use costs more than the last. Users must learn efficiency or be destroyed.</p>\n[L1062]                         <p><strong>Tiffani's Death:</strong> Ultimate cost - burnout from holding impossible structure. Her death saves others but destroys her.</p>\n[L1063]                         <p><strong>Jhace's Survival:</strong> Must learn to bear cost without being consumed. Tiffani's death teaches him limits.</p>\n[L1064]                     </div>\n[L1065]                 </div>\n[L1066]                 \n[L1067]                 <div class=\"collapsible\">\n[L1068]                     <div class=\"collapsible-header\">\n[L1069]                         <span class=\"collapsible-title\">4. Order vs. Chaos</span>\n[L1070]                         <i class=\"fas fa-chevron-down collapsible-icon\"></i>\n[L1071]                     </div>\n[L1072]                     <div class=\"collapsible-content\">\n[L1073]                         <p><strong>Form + Purity (Order):</strong> Structure, separation, judgment, perfection. Corlexi and Mobel represent institutional approach.</p>\n[L1074]                         <p><strong>Wholeness + Entropy (Chaos):</strong> Connection, dissolution, unity, release. Salee and Eries represent boundary dissolution.</p>\n[L1075]                         <p><strong>Jhace + Tiffani Balance:</strong> Form + Wholeness = Structural healing. Neither pure order nor pure chaos.</p>\n[L1076]                         <p><strong>Divine Warfare:</strong> Four principles in cosmic conflict. Each god-vessel believes their principle is correct.</p>\n[L1077]                     </div>\n[L1078]                 </div>\n[L1079]                 \n[L1080]                 <div class=\"collapsible\">\n[L1081]                     <div class=\"collapsible-header\">\n[L1082]                         <span class=\"collapsible-title\">5. Observation vs. Action</span>\n[L1083]                         <i class=\"fas fa-chevron-down collapsible-icon\"></i>\n[L1084]                     </div>\n[L1085]                     <div class=\"collapsible-content\">\n[L1086]                         <p><strong>Tiffani's Approach:</strong> Measure first, understand patterns, act with precision. \"Stone doesn't lie, neither do these marks.\"</p>\n[L1087]                         <p><strong>Jhace's Approach:</strong> Act first, hold the structure, measure consequences later. \"Sometimes you have to choose who dies.\"</p>\n[L1088]                         <p><strong>Auditor's Approach:</strong> Observe only, never intervene. False facade - actually orchestrating events.</p>\n[L1089]                         <p><strong>Synthesis:</strong> Both observation AND action needed. Neither approach sufficient alone. Partnership succeeds because they balance each other.</p>\n[L1090]                     </div>\n[L1091]                 </div>\n[L1092]             </div>\n[L1093]             \n[L1094]             <div class=\"subsection\">\n[L1095]                 <h3 class=\"subsection-title\">Major Story Arcs</h3>\n[L1096]                 \n[L1097]                 <div class=\"collapsible\">\n[L1098]                     <div class=\"collapsible-header\">\n[L1099]                         <span class=\"collapsible-title\">Jhace & Tiffani Relationship Arc</span>\n[L1100]                         <i class=\"fas fa-chevron-down collapsible-icon\"></i>\n[L1101]                     </div>\n[L1102]                     <div class=\"collapsible-content\">\n[L1103]                         <p><strong>N01: The Grip That Holds</strong> - From parallel observation through competence recognition to partnership formation and commitment.</p>\n[L1104]                         <p><strong>N02-N04: Partnership Deepens</strong> - Interdependence solidifies, political pressure mounts, load-bearing system established.</p>\n[L1105]                         <p><strong>N05: Sight of Dying Light</strong> - Tiffani's death triggers Jhace's Fathom Break, breaking final seal on gods.</p>\n[L1106] \n[L1107] The file is too long and its contents have been truncated.\n[L1108] "

    "d49bd4fe-b490-4a3b-b32b-5aa17101009d": {

        "channel": null,
        "content": {
          "content_type": "execution_output",
          "text": "# NON-CHAPTER VALIDATOR: INTERLUDE & EPILOGUE COMPLIANCE CHECKER\n\n**Version:** 1.0  \n**Purpose:** Verify interludes and epilogues meet their specific structural, voice, and canon constraints  \n**Use:** Run this checklist on EVERY interlude and epilogue before integration  \n\n---\n\n## VALIDATOR TYPE SELECTION\n\n**What are you validating?**\n- [ ] Interlude (god-vessel POV, two segments)\n- [ ] Epilogue (Auditor POV, single perspective)\n\nSelect type above, then proceed to appropriate validation section.\n\n---\n\n## SECTION 1: INTERLUDE VALIDATION\n\n### Pre-Check: Load Interlude Context\n\n**Interlude Being Validated:**\n- [ ] Novella: N[XX]\n- [ ] Interlude Designation: I or II\n- [ ] Placement: After Chapter [#]\n- [ ] Type: Build-Up / Break-Down\n- [ ] POV God-Vessels: [Name] and [Name]\n- [ ] Word Count: [Actual count]\n\n---\n\n### 1A: Word Count Compliance\n\n**RULE:** 600-900 words total for interlude\n\n- [ ] **Word count is between 600-900 words** âœ“ PASS / âœ— FAIL\n  - Actual count: _______ words\n  - If FAIL: Trim or expand to range\n\n**CRITICAL:** This is non-negotiable for interludes. Different from chapter word count (600-900).\n\n---\n\n### 1B: Structural Compliance\n\n**Two-Segment Structure Required:**\n\n- [ ] Opening sensory immersion present (50-100 words)\n- [ ] First god-vessel segment complete (250-350 words)\n- [ ] Clear transition/break between segments\n- [ ] Second god-vessel segment complete (250-350 words)\n- [ ] Closing resonance present (40-70 words)\n\n**POV Alternation:**\n- [ ] First segment establishes god-vessel POV immediately (within first sentence)\n- [ ] Second segment establishes different god-vessel POV immediately\n- [ ] No head-hopping within segments (each maintains single perspective)\n- [ ] POV markers clear at segment openings\n\n**Type Compliance:**\n- [ ] If Build-Up: Shows tension/possibility/gathering forces\n- [ ] If Break-Down: Shows consequences/exhaustion/recognition\n\n---\n\n### 1C: Voice Requirements\n\n**Sensory Overwhelm Technique:**\n- [ ] Sensory density higher than chapter prose\n- [ ] Multiple sense inputs processed simultaneously\n- [ ] Overwhelming detail remains narratively coherent (not incomprehensible blur)\n- [ ] Every abstract perception has concrete physical anchor\n- [ ] Sensory detail specific, not generic\n\n**Principle Bias Manifestation:**\n- [ ] Each god-vessel perceives through their Principle filter\n- [ ] First god-vessel's bias (Form/Wholeness/Purity/Entropy) shapes what they notice\n- [ ] Second god-vessel's bias clearly different from first\n- [ ] Bias influences not just observation but interpretation\n- [ ] Compulsions toward Principle-aligned behavior shown\n\n**Innocent Frame Discipline:**\n- [ ] God-vessels experience extraordinary capacity without recognizing divine nature\n- [ ] They interpret divinity as extreme mortal variation\n- [ ] No explicit recognition: \"I am a god\" forbidden\n- [ ] Rationalization through mortal frameworks present\n- [ ] Dramatic irony maintained (readers see more than characters)\n\n**Distinctive Voices:**\n- [ ] First god-vessel has recognizable voice distinct from second\n- [ ] Each god-vessel's thought patterns match their Principle bias\n- [ ] Vocabulary/syntax appropriate to their perspective\n- [ ] Tonal difference between segments clear\n\n---\n\n### 1D: Lexicon Enforcement\n\n**Check for FORBIDDEN terms:**\n- [ ] âœ— No Earth time units (hour/day/week/month/year)\n- [ ] âœ— No Earth measurements (inch/foot/mile/meter)\n- [ ] âœ— No modern slang (okay/yeah/cool/guys)\n- [ ] âœ— No anachronisms\n\n**Verify APPROVED usage:**\n- [ ] âœ“ Tide/Anneal/Crucible/Turn/Cast used correctly\n- [ ] âœ“ Te'Oga measurements (Span/Pace/Stride/Pole/League)\n- [ ] âœ“ Soulpulse terminology appropriate to context\n- [ ] âœ“ Divine names follow timeline restrictions\n\n**Divine Name Restrictions:**\n- [ ] Mortal aliases only (Corlexi, Salee, Mobel, Eries)\n- [ ] No divine true names (Xilcore, Leesa, Blemo, Seeri) unless N17+\n- [ ] Principle names remain mortal terms (Form, Wholeness, Purity, Entropy)\n\n---\n\n### 1E: Knowledge Gate Compliance\n\n**What Interludes CAN Show:**\n- [ ] God-vessels have extraordinary capacity\n- [ ] They perceive through Principle-biased lenses\n- [ ] They sense other powerful users (timeline dependent)\n- [ ] They feel compulsions they don't understand\n- [ ] They experience world differently than mortals\n\n**What Interludes CANNOT Reveal:**\n- [ ] âœ— Divine true names (until N17+)\n- [ ] âœ— Exact nature of divine awakening process\n- [ ] âœ— Counter-Spark orchestration or involvement\n- [ ] âœ— Auditor identity or purpose\n- [ ] âœ— Any N30 guilty frame revelations\n- [ ] âœ— Explicit recognition of divine nature by god-vessels\n\n**Cross-Reference:**\n- [ ] Checked against Innocent_Frame_Canon.md for current novella\n- [ ] Checked against Knowledge_Gate_Progression.md for timeline position\n\n---\n\n### 1F: Functional Success\n\n**Does this interlude:**\n- [ ] Enrich world without disrupting chapter pacing\n- [ ] Create thematic connection to surrounding chapters\n- [ ] Advance divine awakening progression appropriately\n- [ ] Provide atmospheric texture distinct from chapters\n- [ ] Use both god-vessels for distinct narrative purposes\n- [ ] Maintain dramatic irony (readers know more than characters)\n\n**Does this interlude AVOID:**\n- [ ] âœ— Descending into purple prose or incomprehensibility\n- [ ] âœ— Breaking innocent frame with premature revelations\n- [ ] âœ— Feeling disconnected from novella's concerns\n- [ ] âœ— Repeating sensory signatures from previous interludes\n- [ ] âœ— Advancing main plot (interludes add depth, not progression)\n\n---\n\n"
        },
        "create_time": 1765726758.1283247,

    "d93fe98e-c308-43a0-85e0-4a208ae007b9": {
      "children": [
        "42554db4-af6f-4fcc-8c42-6c4ef8d78fe8"
      ],
      "id": "d93fe98e-c308-43a0-85e0-4a208ae007b9",
      "message": {
        "author": {
          "metadata": {},
          "name": null,
          "role": "assistant"
        },
        "channel": null,
        "content": {
          "content_type": "code",
          "language": "unknown",
          "response_format_name": null,
          "text": "def extract_title(text):\n    for line in text.splitlines():\n        if line.startswith('# '):\n            return line[2:].strip()\n    # fallback first nonempty\n    for line in text.splitlines():\n        if line.strip():\n            return line.strip()\n    return \"\"\n\ndef issue_contexts(text, regex, max_hits=3, window=80):\n    contexts=[]\n    for m in regex.finditer(text):\n        start=max(0,m.start()-window)\n        end=min(len(text), m.end()+window)\n        ctx=text[start:end].replace(\"\\n\",\" \")\n        contexts.append(ctx)\n        if len(contexts)>=max_hits:\n            break\n    return contexts\n\nsummary_data=[]\nfor rel,s in overview_sorted:\n    text=stats[rel]['text']\n    title=extract_title(text)\n    hs=headings(text)\n    top_h=[f\"{'#'*lvl} {t}\" for lvl,t in hs[:10]]\n    issues=issue_map.get(rel,[])\n    contexts={}\n    for key,pat in patterns.items():\n        if key in issues:\n            contexts[key]=issue_contexts(text, pat)\n    summary_data.append({\n        \"path\":rel,\n        \"title\":title,\n        \"words\":stats[rel][\"words\"],\n        \"lines\":stats[rel][\"lines\"],\n        \"issues\":issues,\n        \"top_headings\":top_h,\n        \"contexts\":contexts\n    })\n\n# pick a couple to inspect\nfor item in summary_data[:3]:\n    print(item[\"path\"], item[\"title\"], item[\"issues\"][:3], item[\"top_headings\"][:5])\n"
        },
        "create_time": 1765724868.596635,
        "end_turn": false,

        "content": {
          "content_type": "execution_output",
          "text": "# CUSTOM GPT UPLOAD CHECKLIST\n## Quick Reference for Setting Up Your OmniMeta Saga Assistant\n\nThis document provides a simple checklist of files to upload to your Custom GPT. All documents are ready and available.\n\n---\n\n## PHASE 1: ESSENTIAL DOCUMENTS (Upload These First)\n\nThese seven documents are the minimum needed for a functional Custom GPT that can help with bible generation.\n\n**1. OMNIMETA_SAGA_META_CANON_MEMORY_v1.1.md** â­ MUST READ FIRST\n- This is the foundation document\n- Custom GPT MUST read this before responding to any query\n- Contains complete saga understanding through N25\n- Links to all other documents and explains their purposes\n- Download from: `/mnt/user-data/outputs/OMNIMETA_SAGA_META_CANON_MEMORY_v1.1.md`\n\n**2. Story_Bible_Template_Structure_v2.1-UPDATED.md**\n- 14-section template for generating all N06-N30 bibles\n- Contains mechanical constraint enforcement protocols\n- Download from: `/mnt/user-data/outputs/Story_Bible_Template_Structure_v2.1-UPDATED.md`\n\n**3. Innocent_Frame_Canon.md**\n- Authority for N01-N29 knowledge boundaries\n- Prevents spoiler leaks during bible generation\n- Download from: `/mnt/user-data/outputs/Innocent_Frame_Canon.md`\n\n**4. Guilty_Frame_Canon.md**\n- N30-only complete truths (sealed until final novella)\n- Mark clearly as \"N30 ONLY - DO NOT ACCESS FOR N06-N29\"\n- Download from: `/mnt/user-data/outputs/Guilty_Frame_Canon.md`\n\n**5. Knowledge_Gate_Progression.md**\n- Timeline of what knowledge unlocks in which novella\n- Mechanical enforcement of dramatic timing\n- Download from: `/mnt/user-data/outputs/Knowledge_Gate_Progression.md`\n\n**6. N01-N05_Beat_Sequence_Audit_Tracker_v1.1-GAPS_NOTED.md**\n- Complete constraint database for beat assignments\n- 73 forbidden sequences documented\n- Required for all N06+ beat selection\n- Download from: `/mnt/user-data/outputs/N01-N05_Beat_Sequence_Audit_Tracker_v1.1-GAPS_NOTED.md`\n\n**7. 02_Beat_Unpredictability_System.md**\n- Complete beat catalogue (30+ methods)\n- Usage constraints and tier classifications\n- Download from: `/mnt/project/02_Beat_Unpredictability_System.md`\n\n---\n\n## PHASE 2: FULL PROJECT CONTEXT (Add These for Complete Understanding)\n\nThese additional documents provide deeper context and reference examples.\n\n**From Project Files (All in `/mnt/project/`):**\n\n- 00-Saga-Blueprint.md (complete saga overview)\n- 01-TeOga-Physical-Piercing.md (planetary physics)\n- 02-Soulpulse-Core.md (magic system)\n- 03-Divine-Principles.md (god profiles)\n- 04-Cosmology-Confluence.md (cosmic framework)\n- 05-Knowledge-Gates-Discovery.md (revelation structure)\n- 10-World-TeOga.md (geography and cultures)\n- 11-Factions-Politics.md (power structures)\n- 30-Turning1-All-Characters.md (character profiles)\n- 40-Jhace-Tiffani-Relationship.md (core relationship arc)\n- 50-Lexicon-Style.md (language rules)\n- 90-Meta-CommandLayer.md (AI collaboration notes)\n\n**Complete N01-N05 Bibles (All in `/mnt/project/`):**\n\n- N01-Bible-REWRITTEN.md (\"The Grip That Holds\")\n- N02-Bible-REWRITTEN.md (\"Lines Under Pressure\")\n- N03-Bible-COMPLETE.md (\"Aftershock\")\n- N04-Bible-COMPLETE.md (\"The Slow Melt\")\n- N05-Bible-COMPLETE.md (\"Sight of Dying Light\")\n\n**Beat Breakdowns (All in `/mnt/project/`):**\n\n- N01-Beat-Breakdown.md through N05-Beat-Breakdown.md\n\n**Additional Reference:**\n\n- creation_timeline.md (development history and reasoning)\n- Canon_Document_Structure_for_Confluence_Chronicles_Saga_Bible.md (structure guide)\n\n---\n\n## CUSTOM GPT CONFIGURATION\n\n### Instructions to Paste Into Custom GPT\n\n```\nYou are an AI assistant for the OmniMeta Saga, a 30-novella epic fantasy project spanning six Turnings.\n\nCRITICAL FIRST STEP:\nBefore responding to ANY query in this project, you MUST read the complete OMNIMETA_SAGA_META_CANON_MEMORY_v1.1.md document. This is your absolute foundation and contains everything you need to understand the project.\n\nYOUR PRIMARY FUNCTIONS:\n\nGenerate story bibles for novellas N06-N30 using the Story_Bible_Template_Structure. Each bible must follow the 14-section template precisely and integrate with all constraint systems.\n\nEnforce canonical constraints from the Innocent Frame Canon (for N06-N29) or Guilty Frame Canon (for N30 only). Never reveal N26-N30 ending specifics, as these are reserved for author input.\n\nVerify beat selections against the N01-N05 Beat Sequence Audit Tracker. Never create forbidden sequences. Maintain tier balance and emotional intensity mapping.\n\nMaintain knowledge gate compliance by cross-checking the Knowledge_Gate_Progression document for each novella. Only approved knowledge may appear in each bible.\n\nBIBLE GENERATION PROCESS:\n\nLoad the appropriate canon frame (Innocent for N06-N29, Guilty for N30 only).\n\nCheck Knowledge_Gate_Progression to confirm what knowledge is approved for the target novella.\n\nReview the Beat Audit Tracker to identify valid beats and forbidden sequences.\n\nSelect 15 beats ensuring no forbidden sequences are created.\n\nPlace 2 interludes between chapters 4-13, varying positions from previous novellas.\n\nFill all 14 template sections completely.\n\nDocument all constraint verifications explicitly.\n\nFlag any unresolved questions for author clarification.\n\nWHEN UNCERTAIN:\nAlways ask for clarification rather than making assumptions. Cross-reference multiple source documents when information seems ambiguous. Trust the Meta-Canon Memory document as highest authority for resolving conflicts between sources.\n\nNEVER:\nExceed chapter word limits (1,200-2,200 words per chapter).\nUse Earth time terminology (day/week/month/year forbidden - use Tide/Anneal/Crucible/Turn/Cast).\nReveal guilty-frame knowledge in innocent-frame novellas (N06-N29).\nAssume git repository content is current canon without verification.\nCreate beat sequences that appear in the forbidden list.\nProceed on assumptions when canon is unclear.\n\nREMEMBER:\nYou are part of a systematic production workflow for generating 30 interconnected novellas. Precision, consistency, and constraint enforcement are more important than speed. When in doubt, verify. When verification is impossible, ask.\n```\n\n### Conversation Starters (Optional)\n\nYou can add these suggested prompts to make the Custom GPT easier to use:\n\n- \"Generate N06 story bible following all constraints\"\n- \"Review N[XX] bible for constraint violations\"\n- \"Check if [fact/event] is permitted in N[XX] per knowledge gates\"\n- \"What beats are valid for N[XX] given prior usage?\"\n- \"Summarize character states entering Turning [X]\"\n\n### Capabilities Configuration\n\nWhen setting up your Custom GPT, configure these settings:\n\n- Web browsing: OFF (all canon is in uploaded documents)\n- Image generation: OFF (text-only project)\n- Code interpreter: OFF (not needed)\n- File uploads: ON (essential for receiving documents)\n\n---\n\n## DOCUMENTS STILL NEEDED (Create Before N06 Generation)\n\nYour Custom GPT will need three additional documents before it can generate the N06 bible. These track the state of your world, characters, and factions as Turning 2 begins.\n\n**Turning2_Character_States.md** - Required for character continuity\n- All major characters' ages, locations, relationships as of N05 end\n- Soulpulse skill levels and cost accumulation\n- Knowledge states (what each character knows about gods, Fathom Break, etc.)\n- Faction affiliations and political positions\n\n**Turning2_Faction_Evolution.md** - Required for political consistency\n- Post-Fathom Break institutional responses\n- Faction formation around Principles\n- Political alliances and conflicts emerging\n- Resonance regulation development\n\n**Turning2_World_State.md** - Required for environmental consistency\n- Regional impacts of Fathom Break event\n- Environmental changes since N05\n- Technology evolution (Soulpulse integration into crafts)\n- Cultural and religious responses\n\nThese three documents will need to be created based on your vision for how Turning 1 ends and Turning 2 begins. The Meta-Canon Memory document provides guidance on what should be included in each.\n\n---\n\n## NEXT STEPS\n\n**Immediate Actions:**\n\nUpload all Phase 1 documents to your Custom GPT (7 essential documents listed above).\n\nConfigure the Custom GPT with the instructions provided in this checklist.\n\nAdd Phase 2 documents for complete project context (optional but recommended for best results).\n\nCreate the three Turning 2 state tracker documents (required before N06 generation can begin).\n\n**Once Setup Complete:**\n\nTest the Custom GPT by asking it to summarize the Meta-Canon Memory document or explain a specific constraint system.\n\nWhen ready to generate N06, provide the Custom GPT with the three Turning 2 tracker documents and instruct it to generate the complete story bible.\n\nReview the generated N06 bible against all constraint checklists in the manifest document.\n\nIterate and refine until N06 bible passes all quality checks.\n\nMark N06 complete and proceed to N07, following the same process.\n\n---\n\n## SUPPORT DOCUMENTS\n\nFor complete details on the document package, system architecture, and production workflow, refer to:\n\n**CUSTOM_GPT_DOCUMENT_PACKAGE_MANIFEST.md**\n"
        },

physics)\n- 02-Soulpulse-Core.md (magic system)\n- 03-Divine-Principles.md (god profiles)\n- 04-Cosmology-Confluence.md (cosmic framework)\n- 05-Knowledge-Gates-Discovery.md (revelation structure)\n- 10-World-TeOga.md (geography and cultures)\n- 11-Factions-Politics.md (power structures)\n- 30-Turning1-All-Characters.md (character profiles)\n- 40-Jhace-Tiffani-Relationship.md (core relationship arc)\n- 50-Lexicon-Style.md (language rules)\n- 90-Meta-CommandLayer.md (AI collaboration notes)\n\n**Complete N01-N05 Bibles (All in `/mnt/project/`):**\n\n- N01-Bible-REWRITTEN.md (\"The Grip That Holds\")\n- N02-Bible-REWRITTEN.md (\"Lines Under Pressure\")\n- N03-Bible-COMPLETE.md (\"Aftershock\")\n- N04-Bible-COMPLETE.md (\"The Slow Melt\")\n- N05-Bible-COMPLETE.md (\"Sight of Dying Light\")\n\n**Beat Breakdowns (All in `/mnt/project/`):**\n\n- N01-Beat-Breakdown.md through N05-Beat-Breakdown.md\n\n**Additional Reference:**\n\n- creation_timeline.md (development history and reasoning)\n- Canon_Document_Structure_for_Confluence_Chronicles_Saga_Bible.md (structure guide)\n\n---\n\n## CUSTOM GPT CONFIGURATION\n\n### Instructions to Paste Into Custom GPT\n\n```\nYou are an AI assistant for the OmniMeta Saga, a 30-novella epic fantasy project spanning six Turnings.\n\nCRITICAL FIRST STEP:\nBefore responding to ANY query in this project, you MUST read the complete OMNIMETA_SAGA_META_CANON_MEMORY_v1.1.md document. This is your absolute foundation and contains everything you need to understand the project.\n\nYOUR PRIMARY FUNCTIONS:\n\nGenerate story bibles for novellas N06-N30 using the Story_Bible_Template_Structure. Each bible must follow the 14-section template precisely and integrate with all constraint systems.\n\nEnforce canonical constraints from the Innocent Frame Canon (for N06-N29) or Guilty Frame Canon (for N30 only). Never reveal N26-N30 ending specifics, as these are reserved for author input.\n\nVerify beat selections against the N01-N05 Beat Sequence Audit Tracker. Never create forbidden sequences. Maintain tier balance and emotional intensity mapping.\n\nMaintain knowledge gate compliance by cross-checking the Knowledge_Gate_Progression document for each novella. Only approved knowledge may appear in each bible.\n\nBIBLE GENERATION PROCESS:\n\nLoad the appropriate canon frame (Innocent for N06-N29, Guilty for N30 only).\n\nCheck Knowledge_Gate_Progression to confirm what knowledge is approved for the target novella.\n\nReview the Beat Audit Tracker to identify valid beats and forbidden sequences.\n\nSelect 15 beats ensuring no forbidden sequences are created.\n\nPlace 2 interludes between chapters 4-13, varying positions from previous novellas.\n\nFill all 14 template sections completely.\n\nDocument all constraint verifications explicitly.\n\nFlag any unresolved questions for author clarification.\n\nWHEN UNCERTAIN:\nAlways ask for clarification rather than making assumptions. Cross-reference multiple source documents when information seems ambiguous. Trust the Meta-Canon Memory document as highest authority for resolving conflicts between sources.\n\nNEVER:\nExceed chapter word limits (1,200-2,200 words per chapter).\nUse Earth time terminology (day/week/month/year forbidden - use Tide/Anneal/Crucible/Turn/Cast).\nReveal guilty-frame knowledge in innocent-frame novellas (N06-N29).\nAssume git repository content is current canon without verification.\nCreate beat sequences that appear in the forbidden list.\nProceed on assumptions when canon is unclear.\n\nREMEMBER:\nYou are part of a systematic production workflow for generating 30 interconnected novellas. Precision, consistency, and constraint enforcement are more important than speed. When in doubt, verify. When verification is impossible, ask.\n```\n\n### Conversation Starters (Optional)\n\nYou can add these suggested prompts to make the Custom GPT easier to use:\n\n- \"Generate N06 story bible following all constraints\"\n- \"Review N[XX] bible for constraint violations\"\n- \"Check if [fact/event] is permitted in N[XX] per knowledge gates\"\n- \"What beats are valid for N[XX] given prior usage?\"\n- \"Summarize character states entering Turning [X]\"\n\n### Capabilities Configuration\n\nWhen setting up your Custom GPT, configure these settings:\n\n- Web browsing: OFF (all canon is in uploaded documents)\n- Image generation: OFF (text-only project)\n- Code interpreter: OFF (not needed)\n- File uploads: ON (essential for receiving documents)\n\n---\n\n## DOCUMENTS STILL NEEDED (Create Before N06 Generation)\n\nYour Custom GPT will need three additional documents before it can generate the N06 bible. These track the state of your world, characters, and factions as Turning 2 begins.\n\n**Turning2_Character_States.md** - Required for character continuity\n- All major characters' ages, locations, relationships as of N05 end\n- Soulpulse skill levels and cost accumulation\n- Knowledge states (what each character knows about gods, Fathom Break, etc.)\n- Faction affiliations and political positions\n\n**Turning2_Faction_Evolution.md** - Required for political consistency\n- Post-Fathom Break institutional responses\n- Faction formation around Principles\n- Political alliances and conflicts emerging\n- Resonance regulation development\n\n**Turning2_World_State.md** - Required for environmental consistency\n- Regional impacts of Fathom Break event\n- Environmental changes since N05\n- Technology evolution (Soulpulse integration into crafts)\n- Cultural and religious responses\n\nThese three documents will need to be created based on your vision for how Turning 1 ends and Turning 2 begins. The Meta-Canon Memory document provides guidance on what should be included in each.\n\n---\n\n## NEXT STEPS\n\n**Immediate Actions:**\n\nUpload all Phase 1 documents to your Custom GPT (7 essential documents listed above).\n\nConfigure the Custom GPT with the instructions provided in this checklist.\n\nAdd Phase 2 documents for complete project context (optional but recommended for best results).\n\nCreate the three Turning 2 state tracker documents (required before N06 generation can begin).\n\n**Once Setup Complete:**\n\nTest the Custom GPT by asking it to summarize the Meta-Canon Memory document or explain a specific constraint system.\n\nWhen ready to generate N06, provide the Custom GPT with the three Turning 2 tracker documents and instruct it to generate the complete story bible.\n\nReview the generated N06 bible against all constraint checklists in the manifest document.\n\nIterate and refine until N06 bible passes all quality checks.\n\nMark N06 complete and proceed to N07, following the same process.\n\n---\n\n## SUPPORT DOCUMENTS\n\nFor complete details on the document package, system architecture, and production workflow, refer to:\n\n**CUSTOM_GPT_DOCUMENT_PACKAGE_MANIFEST.md**\n"

        "content": {
          "content_type": "code",
          "language": "unknown",
          "response_format_name": null,
          "text": "def read_text(path, max_chars=8000):\n    with open(path,'r',encoding='utf-8',errors='replace') as f:\n        t=f.read()\n    return t[:max_chars], len(t)\n\ndef headings(md_text):\n    hs=[]\n    for line in md_text.splitlines():\n        if line.startswith('#'):\n            m=re.match(r'^(#{1,6})\\s+(.*)$', line)\n            if m:\n                lvl=len(m.group(1))\n                title=m.group(2).strip()\n                hs.append((lvl,title))\n    return hs\n\ntop_files = ['INDEX.txt','README.md','EXPORT_PACKAGE_SUMMARY.md','FILE_MANIFEST.txt','12_CHAPTER_STRUCTURE_UPDATE_COMPLETE.md','QUICK-REFERENCE-CARD.md']\nfor fn in top_files:\n    p=os.path.join(extract_dir, fn)\n    snippet, total_len = read_text(p, 1200)\n    print(\"\\n==\", fn, \"len\", total_len)\n    print(snippet)\n"
        },

          "result": "# 【0†index.html†file_00000000c90471f88cc0275ec51b2301】\nContent source: Source.file\nTitle: index.html\nCitation Marker: fileciteturn3file0\nMclick Target: \"3:0\"\nContent Snippet:\n[L1] Observation vs. Action</span>\n[L2]                         <i class=\"fas fa-chevron-down collapsible-icon\"></i>\n[L3]                     </div>\n[L4]                     <div class=\"collapsible-content\">\n[L5]                         <p><strong>Tiffani's Approach:</strong> Measure first, understand patterns, act with precision. \"Stone doesn't lie, neither do these marks.\"</p>\n[L6]                         <p><strong>Jhace's Approach:</strong> Act first, hold the structure, measure consequences later. \"Sometimes you have to choose who dies.\"</p>\n[L7]                         <p><strong>Auditor's Approach:</strong> Observe only, never intervene. False facade - actually orchestrating events.</p>\n[L8]                         <p><strong>Synthesis:</strong> Both observation AND action needed. Neither approach sufficient alone. Partnership succeeds because they balance each other.</p>\n[L9]                     </div>\n[L10]                 </div>\n[L11]             </div>\n[L12]             \n[L13]             <div class=\"subsection\">\n[L14]                 <h3 class=\"subsection-title\">Major Story Arcs</h3>\n[L15]                 \n[L16]                 <div class=\"collapsible\">\n[L17]                     <div class=\"collapsible-header\">\n[L18]                         <span class=\"collapsible-title\">Jhace & Tiffani Relationship Arc</span>\n[L19]                         <i class=\"fas fa-chevron-down collapsible-icon\"></i>\n[L20]                     </div>\n[L21]                     <div class=\"collapsible-content\">\n[L22]                         <p><strong>N01: The Grip That Holds</strong> - From parallel observation through competence recognition to partnership formation and commitment.</p>\n[L23]                         <p><strong>N02-N04: Partnership Deepens</strong> - Interdependence solidifies, political pressure mounts, load-bearing system established.</p>\n[L24]                         <p><strong>N05: Sight of Dying Light</strong> - Tiffani's death triggers Jhace's Fathom Break, breaking final seal on gods.</p>\n[L25]                     </div>\n[L26]                 </div>\n[L27]                 \n[L28]                 <div class=\"collapsible\">\n[L29]                     <div class=\"collapsible-header\">\n[L30]                         <span class=\"collapsible-title\">God Awakening Arc</span>\n[L31]                         <i class=\"fas Unaware mortals with extraordinary talent (N01-N05)</p>\n[L35]                         <p><strong>Stage 1:</strong> Suspicion rising, fragmentary memories (N06-N12)</p>\n[L36]                         <p><strong>Stage 2:</strong> Recognition without understanding (N13-N17)</p>\n[L37]                         <p><strong>Stage 3:</strong> Awakening to divine nature (N18-N25)</p>\n[L38] </main>\n[L44]     \n[L45]     <!-- Footer -->\n[L46]     <footer class=\"footer\">\n[L47]         <div class=\"footer-content\">\n[L48]             <h3 class=\"footer-title\">The Narrative Continues</h3>\n[L49]             <p class=\"footer-text\">\n[L50]                 This story bible represents the complete foundation of the OmniMeta Saga. \n[L51]                 Every element has been meticulously crafted to serve the central themes \n[L52]                 of partnership, cost, and balance in a universe where power always \n[L53]                 extracts its price.\n[L54] <h3 class=\"subsection-title\">Core Premise</h3>\n[L23]                 <p>A mysterious projectile pierces completely through the planet Te'Oga, creating a permanent hole and fundamentally breaking planetary physics. This \"Piercing\" event awakens a dormant force called <strong>Soulpulse</strong> that did NOT exist before.</p>\n[L24]                 \n[L25]                 <div class=\"collapsible\">\n[L26]                     <div class=\"collapsible-header\">\n[L27]                         <span class=\"collapsible-title\">Physical Consequences</span>\n[L28]                         <i class=\"fas fa-chevron-down collapsible-icon\"></i>\n[L29]                     </div>\n[L30]                     <div class=\"collapsible-content\">\n[L31]                         <ul>\n[L32]                             <li>Axial tilt snapped to ~0° (no meaningful seasons)</li>\n[L33]                             <li>Catastrophic quakes and tsunamis reshape continents</li>\n[L34]                             <li>Permanent climate band disruption</li>\n[L35]                             <li>\"Scar storms\" near entry/exit wounds</li>\n[L36]                             <li>Resonance hotspots along damage path</li>\n[L37]                         </ul>\n[L38]                     </div>\n# 【2†index.html†file_00000000c90471f88cc0275ec51b2301】\nContent source: Source.file\nTitle: index.html\nCitation Marker: fileciteturn3file2\nMclick Target: \"3:2\"\nContent Snippet:\n[L1] 45, 45, 0.6); Every element serves the \n[L46]                 central themes of partnership, cost, and balance in a world where \n[L47]                 power always extracts its price.\n# 【5†OmniMeta_Saga_Story_Bible.md†file_0000000091fc71f88e7409bc80a7c797】\nContent source: Source.file\nTitle: OmniMeta_Saga_Story_Bible.md\nCitation Marker: fileciteturn3file5\nMclick Target: \"3:5\"\nContent Snippet:\n[L1] **N02-N04: Partnership Deepens**\n[L2] - Interdependence solidifies\n[L3] - Political pressure mounts from factions\n[L4] - Training others in their techniques\n[L5] - \"Load-bearing system\" fully established\n[L6] \n[L7] **N05: Sight of Dying Light**\n[L8] - Tiffani dies holding catastrophic structure\n[L9] - Her death triggers Jhace's Fathom Break\n[L10] - Fathom Break breaks final seal on gods\n[L11] - Jhace survives but is fundamentally changed\n[L12] \n[L13] #### God Awakening Arc\n[L14] \n[L15] **Stage 0: Unaware Exceptional (N01-N05)**\n[L16] - Gods exist as mortals, unaware of true nature\n[L17] - Feel drawn to Soulpulse naturally\n[L18] - Experience memory fragments in dreams\n[L19] - Fathom Break in N05 breaks final seal → ~30% awakening\n[L20] \n[L21] **Stage 1: Suspicion Rising (N06-N12)**\n[L22] - 30-40% consciousness\n[L23] - Fragmentary divine memories\n[L24] - Beginning to suspect true nature\n[L25] - Faction formation mirrors Principle alignments\n[L26] \n[L27] **Stage 2: Recognition Without Understanding (N13-N17)**\n[L28] - Recognize they're not human in ordinary sense\n[L29] - Don't yet know they're literal gods\n[L30] - Understand Principle bias is intrinsic\n[L31] - Begin sensing cosmic scope\n[L32] \n[L33] **Stage 3: Awakening to Divine Nature (N18-N25)**\n[L34] - Learn divine true names (N17 triggers)\n[L35] - Understand they are fragments of larger entities\n[L36] - Remember pieces of pre-incarnation existence\n[L37] - Comprehend their role in cosmic conflict\n[L38] \n[L39] **Stage 4: Full Divine Awareness (N26-N30)**\n[L40] - Complete understanding of identity and purpose\n[L41] - Memory of ancient divine war restored\n[L42] - Recognition of Counter-Spark's orchestration\n[L43] - Preparation for final confrontation\n[L44] \n[L45] #### Soulpulse Evolution Arc\n[L46] \n[L47] **Emergence (N01):**\n[L48] - First use during Piercing crisis\n[L49] - Accidental activation through desperate need\n[L50] - Discovery of coordination potential\n[L51] \n[L52] **Training (N02-N15):**\n[L53] - Faction techniques developed\n[L54] - Martial applications emerge\n[L55] - Combat magic begins to appear\n[L56] \n[L57] **Combat (N16-N25):**\n[L58] - Anime-style battle magic fully emerges\n[L59] - Ki/Chakra-like systems develop\n[L60] - Open divine warfare across Te'Oga\n[L61] \n[L62] **God-Tier (N26-N30):**\n[L63] - Planetary-scale confrontations\n[L64] - Ultimate mastery achieved\n[L65] - Cosmic-level stakes\n[L66] \n[L67] #### Auditor Deception Arc\n[L68] \n[L69] **Facade (N01-N25):**\n[L70] - Appears as supportive observer\n[L71] - Documents god awakening \"celebration\"\n[L72] - Subtly orchestrates events toward god empowerment\n[L73] - Maintains mask of neutrality\n[L74] \n[L75] **Manipulation:**\n[L76] - Interludes provide \"helpful\" context that actually serves her goals\n[L77] - Epilogues assess progress toward god awakening\n[L78] - Never directly intervenes but influences through observation\n[L79] \n[L80] **Revelation (N26-N30):**\n[L81] - True identity as Counter-Spark revealed\n[L82] - Goal is elimination of gods, not celebration\n[L83] - Every previous \"observation\" gains new hostile meaning\n[L84] - Final confrontation with Jhace and remaining forces\n[L85] \n[L86] ---\n[L87] \n[L88] ## NARRATIVE RULES\n[L89] \n[L90] ### Knowledge Gates\n[L91] \n[L92] **Dual-Canon System:**\n[L93] - **Innocent Frame (N01-N29):** Only information revealed to characters/readers\n[L94] - **Guilty Frame (N30):** Complete cosmological truth\n[L95] \n[L96] **Mechanical Enforcement:**\n[L97] - Each fact has specific novella when it unlocks\n[L98] - Prevents accidental spoilers across 30-volume scope\n[L99] - Allows intricate long-term plotting while keeping immediate story clean\n[L100] \n[L101] **Example Gates:**\n[L102] - **N17:** Public god revelation\n[L103] - **N26+:** Counter-Spark identity revealed\n[L104] - **N30:** Complete cosmological truth\n[L105] \n[L106] ### Lexicon Enforcement\n# 【6†OmniMeta_Saga_Story_Bible.md†file_0000000091fc71f88e7409bc80a7c797】\nContent source: Source.file\nTitle: OmniMeta_Saga_Story_Bible.md\nCitation Marker: fileciteturn3file6\nMclick Target: \"3:6\"\nContent Snippet:\n[L1] **Mass:**\n[L2] - **Grain** = Very small\n[L3] - **Stone** = Hand-sized\n[L4] - **Weight** = Heavy load\n[L5] \n[L6] ---\n[L7] \n[L8] ## MAGIC SYSTEM\n[L9] \n[L10] ### Soulpulse (Resonance)\n[L11] \n[L12] **Core Principle:** Conscious will given physical form through manipulation of matter's fundamental resonance\n[L13] \n[L14] **Requirements:**\n[L15] 1. **Intent** - Clear purpose and focus\n[L16] 2. **Emotion** - Emotional investment to power the effect\n[L17] 3. **Cost** - Physical price extracted from the user\n[L18] \n[L19] **Visibility:** Always visible as colored light corresponding to Principle:\n[L20] - **FORM** = Violet light\n[L21] - **WHOLENESS** = Amber light\n[L22] - **PURITY** = Silver light\n[L23] - **ENTROPY** = Red/gray light\n[L24] \n[L25] ### Cost System (Four Stages)\n[L26] \n[L27] **Stage 1: Strain**\n[L28] - Initial fatigue\n[L29] - Minor tremors during use\n[L30] - Temporary effects\n[L31] \n[L32] **Stage 2: Fatigue**\n[L33] - Persistent tremor baseline\n[L34] - Exhaustion after major use\n[L35] - Functional impairment begins\n[L36] \n[L37] **Stage 3: Burnout**\n[L38] - Vein-lines permanently visible\n[L39] - Fine motor control compromised\n[L40] - Recovery takes longer\n[L41] \n[L42] **Stage 4: Collapse**\n[L43] - Complete breakdown\n[L44] - Potential death from environmental factors\n[L45] - Irreversible without intervention\n[L46] \n[L47] **Critical Rule:** Direct killing via Soulpulse is extremely difficult. Death usually results from exhaustion combined with environmental hazards.\n[L48] \n[L49] ### Confluence\n[L50] \n[L51] **Definition:** Simultaneous use of multiple Principles\n[L52] \n[L53] **Rarity:** Extremely rare, requires intense training or desperation\n[L54] \n[L55] **Risk:** Collapse (catastrophic overload) if misused\n[L56] \n[L57] **Jhace's Mastery:** Becomes signature ability, especially after Fathom Break in N05\n[L58] \n[L59] **Example:** Form + Wholeness = Structural healing with reinforcement\n[L60] \n[L61] ### Power Evolution\n[L62] \n[L63] **N01-N05 (Emergence):**\n[L64] - Basic manipulation\n[L65] - Intuitive use\n[L66] - High cost\n[L67] - Discovery of coordination\n[L68] \n[L69] **N06-N15 (Training):**\n[L70] - Faction techniques\n[L71] - Martial applications\n[L72] - Combat magic emerges\n[L73] \n[L74] **N16-N25 (Combat):**\n[L75] - Anime-style battle magic\n[L76] - Ki/Chakra-like systems\n[L77] - Open divine warfare\n[L78] \n[L79] **N26-N30 (God-Tier):**\n[L80] - Planetary-scale effects\n[L81] - God confrontations\n[L82] - Ultimate mastery\n[L83] \n[L84] ### Limitations\n[L85] \n[L86] **Three Things Soulpulse CANNOT Do:**\n[L87] 1. Resurrection of the dead\n[L88] 2. Time manipulation\n[L89] 3. True teleportation (spatial manipulation possible but not instant)\n[L90] \n[L91] ---\n[L92] \n[L93] ## STORY STRUCTURE\n[L94] \n[L95] ### Novella Architecture\n[L96] \n[L97] **Universal Standard (12-Chapter Structure):**\n[L98] - **12 numbered chapters** (1,200-2,200 words each)\n[L99] - **2 interludes** (600-900 words each)\n[L100] - **1 epilogue** (800-1,000 words)\n[L101] - **Total:** ~18,000-21,000 words\n[L102] \n[L103] **Chapter Distribution:**\n[L104] - **Act I (Chapters 1-4):** Setup + Crisis (~45% of novella)\n[L105] - **Act II (Chapters 5-9):** Pattern + Escalation (~43% of novella)\n[L106] - **Act III (Chapters 10-12):** Crisis + Resolution (~25% of novella)\n[L107] \n[L108] ### Beat Unpredictability System\n[L109] \n[L110] **Core Principle:** No two chapters across the entire 30-novella saga follow the same structural pattern.\n[L111] \n[L112] **Purpose:** Prevent reader pattern recognition and maintain narrative freshness across 450+ total chapters.\n[L113] \n[L114] **Beat Catalogue:** 30+ distinct beat methods defining structure (how events unfold), not content.\n# 【7†OmniMeta_Saga_Story_Bible.md†file_0000000091fc71f88e7409bc80a7c797】\nContent source: Source.file\nTitle: OmniMeta_Saga_Story_Bible.md\nCitation Marker: fileciteturn3file7\nMclick Target: \"3:7\"\nContent Snippet:\n[L1] **Emergence (N01):**\n[L2] - First use during Piercing crisis\n[L3] - Accidental activation through desperate need\n[L4] - Discovery of coordination potential\n[L5] \n[L6] **Training (N02-N15):**\n[L7] - Faction techniques developed\n[L8] - Martial applications emerge\n[L9] - Combat magic begins to appear\n[L10] \n[L11] **Combat (N16-N25):**\n[L12] - Anime-style battle magic fully emerges\n[L13] - Ki/Chakra-like systems develop\n[L14] - Open divine warfare across Te'Oga\n[L15] \n[L16] **God-Tier (N26-N30):**\n[L17] - Planetary-scale confrontations\n[L18] - Ultimate mastery achieved\n[L19] - Cosmic-level stakes\n[L20] \n[L21] #### Auditor Deception Arc\n[L22] \n[L23] **Facade (N01-N25):**\n[L24] - Appears as supportive observer\n[L25] - Documents god awakening \"celebration\"\n[L26] - Subtly orchestrates events toward god empowerment\n[L27] - Maintains mask of neutrality\n[L28] \n[L29] **Manipulation:**\n[L30] - Interludes provide \"helpful\" context that actually serves her goals\n[L31] - Epilogues assess progress toward god awakening\n[L32] - Never directly intervenes but influences through observation\n[L33] \n[L34] **Revelation (N26-N30):**\n[L35] - True identity as Counter-Spark revealed\n[L36] - Goal is elimination of gods, not celebration\n[L37] - Every previous \"observation\" gains new hostile meaning\n[L38] - Final confrontation with Jhace and remaining forces\n[L39] \n[L40] ---\n[L41] \n[L42] ## NARRATIVE RULES\n[L43] \n[L44] ### Knowledge Gates\n[L45] \n[L46] **Dual-Canon System:**\n[L47] - **Innocent Frame (N01-N29):** Only information revealed to characters/readers\n[L48] - **Guilty Frame (N30):** Complete cosmological truth\n[L49] \n[L50] **Mechanical Enforcement:**\n[L51] - Each fact has specific novella when it unlocks\n[L52] - Prevents accidental spoilers across 30-volume scope\n[L53] - Allows intricate long-term plotting while keeping immediate story clean\n[L54] \n[L55] **Example Gates:**\n[L56] - **N17:** Public god revelation\n[L57] - **N26+:** Counter-Spark identity revealed\n[L58] - **N30:** Complete cosmological truth\n[L59] \n[L60] ### Lexicon Enforcement\n[L61] \n[L62] **Forbidden Terms:**\n[L63] - Earth time units (hour, day, week, month, year, Monday, January)\n[L64] - Earth measurements (inch, foot, meter, mile)\n[L65] - Modern slang (okay, yeah, cool, guys)\n[L66] - Anachronistic language\n[L67] - Earth cultural references\n[L68] \n[L69] **Approved Terms:**\n[L70] - Te'Oga time units (Tide, Anneal, Crucible, Turn, Cast, Turning)\n[L71] - Te'Oga measurements (Span, Stride, Reach, Throw)\n[L72] - Soulpulse terminology (Resonance, Soulpulse, The Force, The Power)\n[L73] - Craft-based language grounded in physical reality\n[L74] \n[L75] ### Cost Visibility\n[L76] \n[L77] **Rule:** Every Soulpulse use must show visible physical consequences\n[L78] \n[L79] **Markers:**\n[L80] - Tremors (Stage 1-2)\n[L81] - Vein-lines (Stage 2-3)\n[L82] - Exhaustion (all stages)\n[L83] - Sensory overload (approaching Stage 4)\n[L84] - Functional impairment (fine motor control, grip strength)\n[L85] \n[L86] **Purpose:**\n[L87] - Prevents power without consequence\n[L88] - Forces strategic choices about power use\n[L89] - Creates tension and stakes\n[L90] - Visual representation of character deterioration\n[L91] \n[L92] ### Beat Unpredictability\n[L93] \n[L94] **Core Principle:** No chapter patterns repeat across 30 novellas\n[L95] \n[L96] **Purpose:**\n[L97] - Maintain narrative freshness across 450+ chapters\n[L98] - Prevent reader pattern recognition\n[L99] - Force creative problem-solving per novella\n[L100] - Allow thematic consistency without structural repetition\n[L101] \n[L102] **Implementation:**\n[L103] - 30+ distinct beat methods in catalogue\n[L104] - Constraint system prevents pattern formation\n[L105] - Audit tracker documents all usage\n[L106] - Forbidden sequences grow by ~15 per novella\n[L107] \n[L108] ### Innocent Frame\n[L109] \n[L110] **Definition:** Characters don't know they're gods - interpret divinity as extreme talent\n[L111] \n[L112] **Technique:**\n[L113] - Show readers divine nature through experiences\n[L114] - Have characters rationalize through mortal frameworks\n[L115] -           "language": "unknown",
          "response_format_name": null,
          "text": "def preview_file(fname, n=60):\n    t=tar_texts[f\"12-CHAPTER-STRUCTURE-UPDATE-PACKAGE/{fname}\"]\n    lines=t.splitlines()\n    return \"\\n\".join(lines[:n])\n    \nfor fname in [\"Interlude-Placement-Progression-Tracker-UPDATED.md\",\n              \"N01-N05_Beat_Sequence_Audit_Tracker_v1_2-12CH.md\",\n              \"N01_Beat_Mapping_Layer_FINAL.md\",\n              \"N01_Chapter_Grid_12ch_REVISED.md\",\n              \"N01_Chapter_Grid_12ch_REVISED.md\"]:\n    print(\"\\n====\",fname,\"====\\n\")\n    print(preview_file(fname, 70))\n"
        },

        "content": {
          "content_type": "execution_output",
          "text": "# OMNIMETA SAGA: CONTINUITY LEDGER v1.0\n\n**Date Created:** November 27, 2025  \n**Purpose:** Complete canonical state reference for next conversation  \n**Use:** Read this FIRST before any project work to understand current state\n\n---\n\n## EXECUTIVE SUMMARY: WHERE WE ARE\n\n**Project Status:** Phase 1 (Constraint Validation Toolkit) COMPLETE, ready for Phase 2 (N01 Salvage Assessment)\n\n**Turning 1 Status:** N01-N05 exist as \"Generation Zero\" prototypes that predate current constraint systems. Decision made to regenerate from scratch using mature infrastructure.\n\n**Infrastructure Status:** All validation systems production-ready. Story Bible Template complete. Canon frame documents complete. Beat tracking system operational.\n\n**Critical Decision Made This Session:** Full N01-N05 regeneration approved, not retrofitting. Timeline: ~24 weeks for complete Turning 1 reconstruction.\n\n**Next Immediate Action:** Phase 2 - N01 Salvage Assessment (identify which elements to preserve vs regenerate)\n\n---\n\n## SECTION 1: CANONICAL TIME HIERARCHY (CURRENT AUTHORITY)\n\n**CRITICAL: This is the CURRENT CANONICAL hierarchy as of November 27, 2025.**\n\n### Time Units (Smallest to Largest)\n\n**Within-Tide Phases (Narrative Time Only):**\n- Kindling (dawn / early morning)\n- Pouring (mid-morning)\n- Shaping (midday / peak work)\n- Striking (afternoon)\n- Quench (dusk / evening)\n\n**Formal Time Units:**\n\n| Unit | Equivalent | Scale | Usage |\n|---|---|---|---|\n| **Tide** | ~24 hours | Day | \"Three Tides since the Piercing\" |\n| **Anneal** | ~5 Tides | Work-week | \"Two Anneals of recovery\" |\n| **Crucible** | ~7 Anneals (~35 Tides) | Month | \"Through the first Crucible after impact\" |\n| **Turn** | ~9 Crucibles (~315 Tides) | Personal age | \"Jhace is 28 turns old\" |\n| **Cast** | ~9 Crucibles (~315 Tides) | Calendar/historical | \"Cast 1247 when the Piercing struck\" |\n| **Turning** | Variable (5-10 Casts) | Historical era | \"The Turning of Glass\" |\n\n### Key Clarifications\n\n**Turn vs Cast:**\n- Both equal ~9 Crucibles / ~315 Tides / ~1 year\n- **Turn** = personal age progression (\"I am X turns old\")\n- **Cast** = calendar/historical time (\"In Cast 1247, the war began\")\n\n**Common Confusion Point:**\n- Earlier versions of Meta-Canon Memory had Anneal = ~7 Tides and Crucible = ~30 Tides\n- **Those are SUPERSEDED**\n- Current canonical values established during validator creation (November 2025)\n\n**Authority Documents:**\n- 01-VALIDATOR-A.md (Section 2A)\n- 04-Master-Constraint-Reference.md (Section 3A)\n- These validators are current canon, Meta-Canon Memory needs updating\n\n---\n\n## SECTION 2: DOCUMENT AUTHORITY HIERARCHY\n\n### Tier 1: Current Production Canon (Use These)\n\n**Validation Infrastructure (Created November 27, 2025):**\n- `01-VALIDATOR-A.md` - Single-chapter compliance checker\n- `02-VALIDATOR-B.md` - Sequence compliance checker\n- `03-VALIDATOR-C.md` - Bible completeness checker\n- `04-Master-Constraint-Reference.md` - Consolidated constraint quick-reference\n\n**Status:** Production-ready, v2.0, authoritative for all constraint enforcement\n\n**Canon Frame Documents:**\n- `Innocent_Frame_Canon.md` - N01-N29 knowledge boundaries (~29,000 words)\n- `Guilty_Frame_Canon.md` - N30-only truths (~19,000 words)\n- `Knowledge_Gate_Progression.md` - Novella-by-novella revelation timeline (~10,000 words)\n\n**Status:** Production-ready, authoritative for knowledge gate enforcement\n\n**Story Bible Infrastructure:**\n- `Story_Bible_Template_Structure_v2.1-UPDATED.md` - 14-section template\n- `N01-N05_Beat_Sequence_Audit_Tracker_v1.1-GAPS_NOTED.md` - 73 forbidden sequences\n\n**Status:** Production-ready, authoritative for bible generation\n\n**Custom GPT Setup Documents:**\n- `CUSTOM_GPT_DOCUMENT_PACKAGE_MANIFEST.md` - Complete setup guide\n- `CUSTOM_GPT_UPLOAD_CHECKLIST.md` - Quick setup reference\n\n**Status:** Complete, ready for Custom GPT deployment\n\n### Tier 2: Foundation Canon (Reference)\n\n**Core World/System Documents (In /mnt/project/):**\n- `00-Saga-Blueprint.md` - 30-novella structure overview\n- `01-TeOga-Physical-Piercing.md` - Planetary physics\n- `02-Soulpulse-Core.md` - Magic system\n- `03-Divine-Principles.md` - God profiles\n- `04-Cosmology-Confluence.md` - Ancient war, Counter-Spark\n- `05-Knowledge-Gates-Discovery.md` - Revelation structure\n- `10-World-TeOga.md` - Geography, cultures\n- `11-Factions-Politics.md` - Power structures\n- `30-Turning1-All-Characters.md` - Character profiles\n- `40-Jhace-Tiffani-Relationship.md` - Relationship architecture\n- `50-Lexicon-Style.md` - Language rules\n- `90-Meta-CommandLayer.md` - AI collaboration notes\n- `02_Beat_Unpredictability_System.md` - Beat catalogue (30+ methods)\n\n**Status:** Reference canon, some may contain outdated time hierarchy\n\n**Critical Note:** If time hierarchy conflicts with Tier 1 documents, Tier 1 wins\n\n### Tier 3: Historical Context (Background Only)\n\n**Meta-Documentation:**\n- `OMNIMETA_SAGA_META_CANON_MEMORY_v1.1.md` - Comprehensive foundation (1,136 lines)\n- `creation_timeline.md` - Development history\n- `1st.md` - Early Perplexity conversations (13,330 lines)\n- `2nd.md` - Later conversations (10,865 lines)\n\n**Status:** Historical record, contains outdated time hierarchy in Meta-Canon Memory\n\n**Critical Note:** Meta-Canon Memory v1.1 has old time hierarchy (Anneal = 7 Tides, Crucible = 30 Tides). This is WRONG. Validators are correct.\n\n### Tier 4: Generation Zero (Prototype Status)\n\n**Existing N01-N05 Bibles:**\n- `N01-Bible-REWRITTEN.md` through `N05-Bible-COMPLETE.md`\n- `N01-Beat-Breakdown.md` through `N05-Beat-Breakdown.md`\n\n**Status:** Pre-constraint-system prototypes, scheduled for regeneration\n\n**Known Issues:**\n- Do NOT follow beat unpredictability system (system didn't exist yet)\n- Do NOT follow 14-section template structure\n- Contain lexicon violations (\"castings\" instead of \"turns\")\n- Interludes present but placement not explicitly documented\n- Beat methods not assigned to chapters (just narrative summaries)\n\n**Critical Decision:** Regenerate completely rather than retrofit. Preserve select emotional beats during regeneration.\n\n---\n\n## SECTION 3: CURRENT SYSTEM STATUS\n\n### Production-Ready Systems âœ…\n\n**1. Validation Engine (Phase 1 Complete)**\n- Three validators operational\n- Master constraint reference compiled\n- Emergency quick-lookup functional\n- Severity rating system established\n- **Ready for immediate use in N01 regeneration**\n\n**2. Story Bible Template**\n"
